clean_body: | | | | Peter, The Democrats are testing us. Since I announced my campaign for Senate last week, Democratic megadonors have been pouring money into South Carolina, trying to turn this beautiful state blue. | | | "Generic Button" Just last year, they managed to raise $120 MILLION to try to take down my friend and colleague, Lindsey Graham. Now, the chair of the DNC is back and he's trying to take his home state of South Carolina again. Peter, the Senate majority hangs in the balance by one vote. If we lose South Carolina, there will be NOTHING stopping the Democrats' radical agenda. "Will you chip in $5, $10, $50, or anything you can to keep South Carolina red and stop the Democrats’ radical agenda?" | | | "Generic Button" The Democrats are scared of my story, and what I represent. My story of going from cotton to Congress in one lifetime goes against every policy they fight for. My message of positive and constitutional conservatism destroys their Washington schemes and socialist dreams. Please, Peter, "chip in anything you can to help me keep South Carolina red and stop the Democrats’ radical agenda." | | | "Generic Button" Thank you, Tim Scott | | PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE 1405 ASHLEY RIVER ROAD CHARLESTON, SC 29407 Don't want to receive any more of our emails? .

clean_body: POLL CLOSES AT MIDNIGHT | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. So we’re circulating an poll to Pennsylvania supporters on whether or not they support the Filibuster. | | | | | President Biden is ready to reform the Filibuster! National Republicans have been using this out-dated tactic to block critical Voting Rights bills like Democrats’ LANDMARK For the People Act (H.R. 1). | | | | [We only need [18] more responses from Pennsylvania for our data to be statistically significant, so please respond promptly:]() Your response is critical, \-- Team Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. If you would like to receive only our most important emails, . Thanks for being a part of the team. | | Sent via . name: Team AOC
subject: A no-go
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
The idea that we would be limited by a bipartisan deal is laughable.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210719-2288-header&t=1&akid=2288%2E2526796%2E3QVPA1)
Alexandria and her progressive colleagues in the House have a plan.
On Friday, Alexandria vowed that she and her colleagues including Reps. Jayapal, Pressley, Tlaib, and Lee **would withhold their votes** on the bipartisan infrastructure bill unless a budget bill that includes climate measures, child care, and immigration reform passes at the same time.
This is a bold move, but it is what’s required to pass a budget bill that _**actually**_ meets the level of crisis we’re in. It’s exactly what Alexandria was elected to do and another example why we need her in Congress.
[Will you show your support in this key moment by chipping in $3 to ensure that Alexandria can continue fighting for our values in Congress today, tomorrow, in 2022 and beyond?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210719?refcode=em20210719-2288-P&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2288_2526796_3QVPA1&akid=2288%2E2526796%2E3QVPA1) A donation of any amount will have a direct and immediate impact.
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210719?refcode=em20210719-2288-P&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=2288_2526796_3QVPA1&akid=2288%2E2526796%2E3QVPA1)**
To catch you up: President Biden’s bipartisan infrastructure deal cut out _major_ Democratic priorities, including measures on climate, eldercare, affordable housing, and much more.
But Democrats have an opportunity to use a rule known as ‘reconciliation’ to pass policies cut out of the infrastructure bill with a simple majority. **We cannot waste it. That’s why Alexandria is demanding that our priorities make it in the reconciliation bill – or else no infrastructure bill.**
Alexandria has been very clear: People across this country elected _Democratic_ majorities in both branches of government and a Democrat to the White House. **Republicans are not in charge of dictating what policies we pass and what policies we don’t.**
It’s up to Congress to deliver on the priorities that voters elected them to fight for – not the lowest common denominator. That’s what Alexandria is laser-focused on.
[A wave of donations right now would ensure that our team can respond to any attacks that come our way and stay focused on the job at hand. If you’re able to, please chip in $3 or anything you can now.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210719?refcode=em20210719-2288-P&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=2288_2526796_3QVPA1&akid=2288%2E2526796%2E3QVPA1)
Pa’lante,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210719?refcode=em20210719-2288-P&t=23&refcode2=2288_2526796_3QVPA1&akid=2288%2E2526796%2E3QVPA1)**

Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

It’s exactly what Alexandria was elected to do and another example why we need her in Congress. A donation of any amount will have a direct and immediate impact. To catch you up: President Biden’s bipartisan infrastructure deal cut out major Democratic priorities, including measures on climate, eldercare, affordable housing, and much more. But Democrats have an opportunity to use a rule known as ‘reconciliation’ to pass policies cut out of the infrastructure bill with a simple majority. We cannot waste it. That’s why Alexandria is demanding that our priorities make it in the reconciliation bill – or else no infrastructure bill. Alexandria has been very clear: People across this country elected Democratic majorities in both branches of government and a Democrat to the White House. Republicans are not in charge of dictating what policies we pass and what policies we don’t. It’s up to Congress to deliver on the priorities that voters elected them to fight for – not the lowest common denominator. That’s what Alexandria is laser-focused on. Pa’lante, Team AOC | | Email us: mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com

name: Scott Fitzgerald
subject: What I saw at the border
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
body:
And how we can fix it! Last week, I traveled to our southern border._What I saw there made one thing **PERFECTLY CLEAR... (see below for that)**_I want to share what I saw. I spoke with the brave members of our Border Patrol and the Department of Homeland Security. I heard about the massive problems with fentanyl, illegal drugs, and much worse crossing the border. They've got a tough job, and the Biden administration is making it harder every day. [**They're counting on US to stand with them - even as the tide of illegal immigration is rising every day. ARE YOU WITH THEM? **](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cnpx-ahkdjtlkr-r/)[**Stand up and SHOW that you haven't forgotten about them!**](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cnpx-ahkdjtlkr-y/)** ** [Join Fitzgerald - Defend Our Border!](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cnpx-ahkdjtlkr-j/) Illegal immigration remains a top priority for the people of Wisconsin's 5th District, and the Biden administration's **open-border** policies are making things worse every day. That is why it was so important to me to get a firsthand perspective.Last month, nearly 200,000 illegal immigrants crossed our border. That's up 450% from last year with Trump in charge, and it's the highest number in 21 years. And they've got a proposal to repeal a key measure - Title 42 - that would make things even worse. The liberals are sending a clear message: **Please come, and if you do, come NOW!** And that's the key takeaway from all of this...**We need to take back the majority before things get even worse! We need to seize back control in Congress, and seize back control over our border.**[**Will YOU step up IMMEDIATELY to help?**](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cnpx-ahkdjtlkr-t/) [Seize Back The Majority - Take Back The Border!](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cnpx-ahkdjtlkr-h/) [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cnpx-ahkdjtlkr-k/) [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cnpx-ahkdjtlkr-u/) [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cnpx-ahkdjtlkr-o/) Thanks,
Scott Fitzgerald [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cnpx-ahkdjtlkr-b/) [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cnpx-ahkdjtlkr-n/)[](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cnpx-ahkdjtlkr-p/) | Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
P.O. Box 5048, Elm Grove, WI 53122 [Preferences](https://scottfitzgerald.updatemyprofile.com/t-cnpx-62D8F9CE-ahkdjtlkr-x) | [Unsubscribe](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-u-cnpx-ahkdjtlkr-m/)
---

https://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=8d91359032981366adbbf90d4de621fecce228ccf92e7465ec868b16755b89811e623f0c183041a3b477f3af9fec659914d23cb668c924b5

Friend,
I had the honor of joining Republican National Committee Chairman Ronna McDaniel as a guest on an episode of “Real America.” Today, it is officially available to stream on all major podcast platforms!

https://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=8d91359032981366adbbf90d4de621fecce228ccf92e7465ec868b16755b89811e623f0c183041a3b477f3af9fec659914d23cb668c924b5
LISTEN NOW >>
I was eager to sit down with the Chairman to discuss the realities and challenges facing our Country, both here at home and abroad. Over the past few months, we have witnessed a major shift from President Trump’s bold and effective America First agenda to the Biden Administration’s weak and apologetic foreign policy on China, at the Border, and in American industry.

Chairman McDaniel and I discussed how current Democrat weakness and failure to lead on the world stage has left the United States vulnerable to some of the world’s most dangerous adversaries - especially the growing power of the Chinese Communist Party. We both agreed that this is a path that must be corrected.

https://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=8d91359032981366adbbf90d4de621fecce228ccf92e7465ec868b16755b89811e623f0c183041a3b477f3af9fec659914d23cb668c924b5
Listen to “Real America” Episode 4 NOW. Follow the link below to hear Chairman McDaniel and I’s conversation. >>

https://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=8d91359032981366adbbf90d4de621fecce228ccf92e7465ec868b16755b89811e623f0c183041a3b477f3af9fec659914d23cb668c924b5
LISTEN NOW >>
We are privileged to live in the greatest Country in the world, and it is our responsibility to ensure it remains that way.

So, I hope you’ll listen and enjoy my conversation with Chairman McDaniel, and I hope it will inspire you to join the fight for the future preservation of our great Nation.

Thank you,
Mike Pompeo

Former Secretary of State

https://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=8d91359032981366adbbf90d4de621fecce228ccf92e7465ec868b16755b89811e623f0c183041a3b477f3af9fec659914d23cb668c924b5

LISTEN NOW >> I was eager to sit down with the Chairman to discuss the realities and challenges facing our Country, both here at home and abroad. Over the past few months, we have witnessed a major shift from President Trump’s bold and effective America First agenda to the Biden Administration’s weak and apologetic foreign policy on China, at the Border, and in American industry. Chairman McDaniel and I discussed how current Democrat weakness and failure to lead on the world stage has left the United States vulnerable to some of the world’s most dangerous adversaries - especially the growing power of the Chinese Communist Party. We both agreed that this is a path that must be corrected. Listen to “Real America” Episode 4 NOW. Follow the link below to hear Chairman McDaniel and I’s conversation. >> LISTEN NOW >> We are privileged to live in the greatest Country in the world, and it is our responsibility to ensure it remains that way. So, I hope you’ll listen and enjoy my conversation with Chairman McDaniel, and I hope it will inspire you to join the fight for the future preservation of our great Nation. Thank you, Mike Pompeo Former Secretary of State LISTEN NOW >> Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.GOP.com

name: Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Action for the week of July 19th: Stop the DC power grab & CRT/school training and resources
body:
| |
---
See below for additional action items. Thank you for everything you do to help protect our individual liberties – both at the local and at the federal level.

Action items for this week include:
* **Tell your Senators to stop the election power grab**
* **Watch recordings of our training webinars & download the toolkits**
* **Sign up to attend an August local government meeting**
* **Learn more about CRT and what you can do to combat it**
* **Reminders and other sign up forms**

See below for details!

_Note: in order to share any links, simply open the link, and copy the URL address, and then paste it wherever it is that you are sharing it._
|
---
**Stop the Election Power Grab
**
Yesterday, July 19th, the United States Senate Rules Committee, chaired by Senator Amy Klobuchar, will hold a field hearing at the National Center for Civil and Human Rights in Atlanta, Georgia. The purpose of the hearing is to bolster the propaganda effort to support Washington, DC’s power grab, as the Democrats seek to undermine state election laws and impose misguided one-size-fits-all Washington directives on our elections.

Please call your two U.S. Senators, especially if you live in West Virginia or Arizona, and voice your objections to this blatant attempt to overturn state election laws. **You can reach the Capitol Switchboard at 202-224-3121.**

The Left has been trying for so long to take over our elections and weaken the integrity of our election system. We cannot allow this to happen, and your calls to Capitol Hill this week are vitally important to ensuring election integrity.
|
---
Last week, Texas Democrats engaged in what can only be described as an expensive publicity stunt that accomplished nothing.

After spending months wrongly decrying the filibuster as a racist relic of the Jim Crow era, Texas Democrats utilized their own form of a filibuster... they fled the state on a private jet with a case of beer, en route to our nation’s capital. They fled the state to stop a vote on common-sense election integrity legislation, that was poised to pass. Funny how when it works in their favor politically, utilizing a tactic much like the filibuster suddenly isn’t racist, right?

Texas Democrats not only abandoned their constituents in fleeing the state, they abandoned the vital task of securing our election. A problem that is all too common amongst Democrats these days...

[Jenny Beth Martin explains in her latest column at Town Hall.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjAxLTFhMDdiNTAyOWNiMjQ3ZDU5ZjJhYTA5N2Q3MDFjN2E4%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90b3duaGFsbC5jb20vY29sdW1uaXN0cy9qZW5ueWJldGhtYXJ0aW4vMjAyMS8wNy8xNC9lbGVjdGlvbi1pbnRlZ3JpdHktbjI1OTI1MjY_bWlkPTQ0MDgyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=ppSgS3otpa1CS95V_uQLJg)
|
---
**Watch recordings of training webinars
**
If you haven’t yet, go ahead and [sign up and commit to attend the July school board meeting](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjAxLTFhMDdiNTAyOWNiMjQ3ZDU5ZjJhYTA5N2Q3MDFjN2E4%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvZm9ybXMvYXR0ZW5kLXNjaG9vbC1ib2FyZC8_bWlkPTQ0MDgyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=U3vJhF9yMaVY1NKJyE7H-g) in your school district. Then, please take some time this week to watch recordings of the three webinars we recently held. After you watch them, please share them with others.
* [Intro to Attend a School Board Meeting](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjAxLTFhMDdiNTAyOWNiMjQ3ZDU5ZjJhYTA5N2Q3MDFjN2E4%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9ldmVudC53ZWJpbmFyamFtLmNvbS9yZWdpc3Rlci8xMy8wNHc4eWMzP21pZD00NDA4MiZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=_SRYhBLHiCtJ9ImoNPqsBw)
* [Next Steps to Attend School Board Meeting](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjAxLTFhMDdiNTAyOWNiMjQ3ZDU5ZjJhYTA5N2Q3MDFjN2E4%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9ldmVudC53ZWJpbmFyamFtLmNvbS9yZWdpc3Rlci8yNi83OHpueWk3bT9taWQ9NDQwODImaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=w9ddnNfYsi4g0XEgXdL8qg)
* [Critical Race Theory Toolkit Intro - Focus for Schools](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjAxLTFhMDdiNTAyOWNiMjQ3ZDU5ZjJhYTA5N2Q3MDFjN2E4%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9ldmVudC53ZWJpbmFyamFtLmNvbS9yZWdpc3Rlci8yNy80OXc2eXN4Nz9taWQ9NDQwODImaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=fuMOFtOc5PYPgB_FszlGmA)

**Links to the toolkits being discussed in the webinars:**
[Attend a School Board Meeting](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjAxLTFhMDdiNTAyOWNiMjQ3ZDU5ZjJhYTA5N2Q3MDFjN2E4%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90cHAtcmVzb3VyY2VzLnMzLmFtYXpvbmF3cy5jb20vdG9vbGtpdHMvQXR0ZW5kX1NjaG9vbF9Cb2FyZF9NZWV0aW5nX0hvd19Ub19HdWlkZS5wZGY_bWlkPTQ0MDgyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=kOvcKzDv4IbHHMYNLiDgPw) (Note: this toolkit has a lot more information that is important to know than just about attending a school board meeting, so we encourage you to look at it, even if you are not attending a meeting.)

[United We Stand: Combatting Critical Race Theory](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjAxLTFhMDdiNTAyOWNiMjQ3ZDU5ZjJhYTA5N2Q3MDFjN2E4%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90cHAtcmVzb3VyY2VzLnMzLmFtYXpvbmF3cy5jb20vdG9vbGtpdHMvVW5pdGVkX1dlX1N0YW5kX0hvd19Ub19HdWlkZS5wZGY_bWlkPTQ0MDgyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=-hEAodOShZ1aXFiHtIka2Q) (Simply scroll down to the red box that says, “How-to Guide,” and enter your email address in the space next to the red box.)
|
---
“The Justice Department’s decision to file suit against the state of Georgia — alleging S.B. 202, the recently enacted law, violates the civil rights of Black voters in the state — is just a taste of things to come, President Biden, Attorney General [Merrick Garland](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjAxLTFhMDdiNTAyOWNiMjQ3ZDU5ZjJhYTA5N2Q3MDFjN2E4%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2FzaGluZ3RvbnRpbWVzLmNvbS90b3BpY3MvbWVycmljay1nYXJsYW5kLz9taWQ9NDQwODImaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=R1XvhCTvVmXopl5u345HBg) and their Democrat allies on Capitol Hill have made clear...”

[Jenny Beth Martin broke down](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjAxLTFhMDdiNTAyOWNiMjQ3ZDU5ZjJhYTA5N2Q3MDFjN2E4%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2FzaGluZ3RvbnRpbWVzLmNvbS9uZXdzLzIwMjEvanVsLzEzL2JpZGVuLWFkbWluaXN0cmF0aW9ucy1wYXJ0aXNhbi1sZWdhbC1hdHRhY2stb24tZ2VvLz9taWQ9NDQwODImaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=p7Iv2ODWGn3Hx6_71i2PLg) how the Biden Administration’s attack on Georgia's voter law is nothing more than a sham.
|
---
**Sign up to attend an August local government meeting**
[**Sign up and commit to attend a local government meeting in August.**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjAxLTFhMDdiNTAyOWNiMjQ3ZDU5ZjJhYTA5N2Q3MDFjN2E4%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvYXR0ZW5kLWxvY2FsLWdvdmVybm1lbnQvP21pZD00NDA4MiZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=eeDLZhflKCd1jkBh4Tn5zQ)**** This could be your city or county governmental body, or if you weren’t able to attend the July school board meeting (or they didn’t have one), you could attend a school board meeting in August.

**If we expect to make any positive changes in our country, we have to get involved locally, and the first step is attending the publicly-held meetings.** Please make this a priority and attend! The webinars we linked above will help you make your plan. And, if you don’t want to speak at the meeting the first time you go, you don’t have to. For now, just go!
[LET US KNOW YOU’LL BE ATTENDING](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjAxLTFhMDdiNTAyOWNiMjQ3ZDU5ZjJhYTA5N2Q3MDFjN2E4%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvYXR0ZW5kLWxvY2FsLWdvdmVybm1lbnQvP21pZD00NDA4MiZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=o4R_sesNRRt2JAWYGI-DWg)
|
---
As school board election season quickly approaches, we’re gearing up to help patriots across the nation win elections against proponents of the bigoted Critical Race Theory ideology.

[The Washington Times has the story about the upcoming fight.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjAxLTFhMDdiNTAyOWNiMjQ3ZDU5ZjJhYTA5N2Q3MDFjN2E4%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTE%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2FzaGluZ3RvbnRpbWVzLmNvbS9uZXdzLzIwMjEvanVsLzEzL3NjaG9vbC1ib2FyZC1yYWNlcy1wcmltZWQtZXhwbG9kZS1jcml0aWNhbC1yYWNlLXRoLz9taWQ9NDQwODImaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=Q-63zdaPnHc6UIW4iMqxmw)
|
---
**Learn about CRT and how to combat it
**
On another front, our new resources for fighting Critical Race Theory and for providing more oversight and accountability of your local school board are available, and we have already heard so much positive feedback. If you have not done so already, we encourage you to check out our toolkits and new training materials. These resources are your first step to becoming more engaged within your school district and the community.
[LEARN MORE ABOUT CRT](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjAxLTFhMDdiNTAyOWNiMjQ3ZDU5ZjJhYTA5N2Q3MDFjN2E4%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTI%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvdXdzLz9taWQ9NDQwODImaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=QO_n_LwNC4qfSqUXY3FvKw)
|
---
**Reminders: Sign up forms and research to do**
**Eternal Vigilance Project**
If you haven’t yet signed up for the Eternal Vigilance Project, please sign up this week! There are two levels available. Sign up at the links below.
[KEEPER OF THE REPUBLIC](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjAxLTFhMDdiNTAyOWNiMjQ3ZDU5ZjJhYTA5N2Q3MDFjN2E4%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTM%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvZm9ybXMva2VlcGVyLW9mLXRoZS1yZXB1YmxpYy8_bWlkPTQ0MDgyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=ptlOSZJwMGR0pESbI7x8tw)
[CHAMPION OF THE REPUBLIC](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjAxLTFhMDdiNTAyOWNiMjQ3ZDU5ZjJhYTA5N2Q3MDFjN2E4%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvZm9ybXMvY2hhbXBpb24tb2YtdGhlLXJlcHVibGljLz9taWQ9NDQwODImaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=boJMJ40_X8jNRD7UaJmhlA)
|
---
**Running for Local Office**
If you’re interested in running for local office, especially if you’d like to run in the 2022 election, now is the time to let us know because you must get trained in 2021!
[LOCAL OFFICE CANDIDATE SURVEY](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjAxLTFhMDdiNTAyOWNiMjQ3ZDU5ZjJhYTA5N2Q3MDFjN2E4%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTU%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvZm9ybXMvbG9jYWwtb2ZmaWNlLWNhbmRpZGF0ZS1zdXJ2ZXkvP21pZD00NDA4MiZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=UyYgGwAs5P28yXQZdVVmig)
|

**Nationwide Summer Events**
The grassroots approved the upcoming events listed below, and the sooner you get yours planned, the better your events will be! [Please fill out the form](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjAxLTFhMDdiNTAyOWNiMjQ3ZDU5ZjJhYTA5N2Q3MDFjN2E4%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTY%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9kb2NzLmdvb2dsZS5jb20vZm9ybXMvZC9lLzFGQUlwUUxTYzMxZnBfUk5YQTlaMWtVZDB0LXUyVDNPdndadnRURUd3MDExaU9PUlBiS2hvb0tBL3ZpZXdmb3JtP3VzcD1zZl9saW5rJm1pZD00NDA4MiZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=otef7y-YNweQbfS9OF_gvw) letting us know whether you will organize or attend these summer events.
[SIGN UP FOR SUMMER EVENTS](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjAxLTFhMDdiNTAyOWNiMjQ3ZDU5ZjJhYTA5N2Q3MDFjN2E4%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTc%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9kb2NzLmdvb2dsZS5jb20vZm9ybXMvZC9lLzFGQUlwUUxTYzMxZnBfUk5YQTlaMWtVZDB0LXUyVDNPdndadnRURUd3MDExaU9PUlBiS2hvb0tBL3ZpZXdmb3JtP3VzcD1zZl9saW5rJm1pZD00NDA4MiZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=HYOKfBisjsZvNG0tYqn5NA)

[WATCH THE TRAILER](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjAxLTFhMDdiNTAyOWNiMjQ3ZDU5ZjJhYTA5N2Q3MDFjN2E4%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly95b3V0dS5iZS9FLUdQU0g3SGVFYz9taWQ9NDQwODImaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=nmWoo5iUt31S9wiTzoGikA)

clean_body: | | See below for additional action items. Thank you for everything you do to help protect our individual liberties – both at the local and at the federal level. Action items for this week include: Tell your Senators to stop the election power grab Watch recordings of our training webinars & download the toolkits Sign up to attend an August local government meeting Learn more about CRT and what you can do to combat it Reminders and other sign up forms See below for details! Note: in order to share any links, simply open the link, and copy the URL address, and then paste it wherever it is that you are sharing it. | Stop the Election Power Grab Yesterday, July 19th, the United States Senate Rules Committee, chaired by Senator Amy Klobuchar, will hold a field hearing at the National Center for Civil and Human Rights in Atlanta, Georgia. The purpose of the hearing is to bolster the propaganda effort to support Washington, DC’s power grab, as the Democrats seek to undermine state election laws and impose misguided one-size-fits-all Washington directives on our elections. Please call your two U.S. Senators, especially if you live in West Virginia or Arizona, and voice your objections to this blatant attempt to overturn state election laws. You can reach the Capitol Switchboard at 202-224-3121. The Left has been trying for so long to take over our elections and weaken the integrity of our election system. We cannot allow this to happen, and your calls to Capitol Hill this week are vitally important to ensuring election integrity. | Last week, Texas Democrats engaged in what can only be described as an expensive publicity stunt that accomplished nothing. After spending months wrongly decrying the filibuster as a racist relic of the Jim Crow era, Texas Democrats utilized their own form of a filibuster... they fled the state on a private jet with a case of beer, en route to our nation’s capital. They fled the state to stop a vote on common-sense election integrity legislation, that was poised to pass. Funny how when it works in their favor politically, utilizing a tactic much like the filibuster suddenly isn’t racist, right? Texas Democrats not only abandoned their constituents in fleeing the state, they abandoned the vital task of securing our election. A problem that is all too common amongst Democrats these days... | Watch recordings of training webinars If you haven’t yet, go ahead and in your school district. Then, please take some time this week to watch recordings of the three webinars we recently held. After you watch them, please share them with others. Links to the toolkits being discussed in the webinars: (Note: this toolkit has a lot more information that is important to know than just about attending a school board meeting, so we encourage you to look at it, even if you are not attending a meeting.) (Simply scroll down to the red box that says, “How-to Guide,” and enter your email address in the space next to the red box.) | “The Justice Department’s decision to file suit against the state of Georgia — alleging S.B. 202, the recently enacted law, violates the civil rights of Black voters in the state — is just a taste of things to come, President Biden, Attorney General and their Democrat allies on Capitol Hill have made clear...” how the Biden Administration’s attack on Georgia's voter law is nothing more than a sham. | Sign up to attend an August local government meeting ** This could be your city or county governmental body, or if you weren’t able to attend the July school board meeting (or they didn’t have one), you could attend a school board meeting in August. If we expect to make any positive changes in our country, we have to get involved locally, and the first step is attending the publicly-held meetings. Please make this a priority and attend! The webinars we linked above will help you make your plan. And, if you don’t want to speak at the meeting the first time you go, you don’t have to. For now, just go! | As school board election season quickly approaches, we’re gearing up to help patriots across the nation win elections against proponents of the bigoted Critical Race Theory ideology. | Learn about CRT and how to combat it On another front, our new resources for fighting Critical Race Theory and for providing more oversight and accountability of your local school board are available, and we have already heard so much positive feedback. If you have not done so already, we encourage you to check out our toolkits and new training materials. These resources are your first step to becoming more engaged within your school district and the community. | Reminders: Sign up forms and research to do Eternal Vigilance Project If you haven’t yet signed up for the Eternal Vigilance Project, please sign up this week! There are two levels available. Sign up at the links below. | Running for Local Office If you’re interested in running for local office, especially if you’d like to run in the 2022 election, now is the time to let us know because you must get trained in 2021! | Nationwide Summer Events The grassroots approved the upcoming events listed below, and the sooner you get yours planned, the better your events will be! letting us know whether you will organize or attend these summer events. | Watch The Red White + Blueprint docuseries | | Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc. operates as a social welfare organization under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions to Tea Party Patriots Action are not deductible as charitable contributions for income tax purposes. © 2021 80 M St SE, First Floor, Washington, D.C. 20003 | **

name: John McGuigan
subject: Bonds.... baby bonds
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MCGUIGAN FOR PA
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32685372/296543367/-1233952322?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDlmMDM5NC01ZmU5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pvnKBzoDKunBaAGh_dAx29YH73nByBDmF--RBxvLwJg=&emci=7eefc498-37e7-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=8d9f0394-5fe9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=18185356)
---

| | Peter, This week, millions of families received the first payments from the newly expanded Child Tax Credit. For so many working families still struggling with the economic impact of congressional Republican tax policies and COVID, the CTC represents a critical lifeline. Economists estimate that it could help cut child poverty nearly in half. _BUT:_ **The Child Tax Credit does almost nothing to address the underlying condition of a generation of Americans struggling with college debt, lower wages, and uncertainty about tomorrow.** Graduating from college debt-free was a big help for me and my wife – we were able to begin our lives together looking forward, not backward, and start building a future right away. Most students are not in the position to make that choice. Attending college means going into debt. Today, 54% of all college students have debt, with an of over $37,000 each. **The total student loan debt is $1.57 TRILLION --that's _three_ times as much money as Bezos, Musk and Gates have combined!** We are discussing a number of popular solutions to the students debt crisis, all of which I support: I am against charging interest on student loans. Yes, the president should cancel a significant portion of student debt, and Congress should follow suit. **More importantly, we need to fix the system so future generations do not repeat these choices**. That's where my concept of baby bonds and community service comes into play. Here are the highlights:
* At birth, each child receives $1,000 and gets annual deposits depending on their family's income compared to the poverty level.
* The funds can be applied to technical school, trades, college, or home buying after high school graduation.
* After receiving a high school or equivalent degree, young Americans are encouraged to spend a year in service receiving health coverage, pay, housing and meals; working on projects in other communities as well as learning civics, career planning and about each other.

For all the details please visit **[McGuiganForPA.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32685373/296543368/-1233952322?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDlmMDM5NC01ZmU5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pvnKBzoDKunBaAGh_dAx29YH73nByBDmF--RBxvLwJg=&emci=7eefc498-37e7-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=8d9f0394-5fe9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=18185356)**. I've spoken to countless Pennsylvanians with tens of thousands in student debt. The problem is stagnating a generation of Americans, hurting our economy, threatening key programs like Social Security, and casting a dark shadow over our children's and grandchildren's future. As Pennsylvania's next Senator, I will focus 100% restoring the American Dream for everyone who calls this country home. **But I can't do it alone, Peter. [Please chip in $20 today to make sure our message reaches every corner of this state. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32685374/296543369/-34735242?refcode=2021-07-20-ctc&recurring=0&amount=20&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=8d9f0394-5fe9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDlmMDM5NC01ZmU5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pvnKBzoDKunBaAGh_dAx29YH73nByBDmF--RBxvLwJg=)** clean_body: | | | Peter, This week, millions of families received the first payments from the newly expanded Child Tax Credit. For so many working families still struggling with the economic impact of congressional Republican tax policies and COVID, the CTC represents a critical lifeline. Economists estimate that it could help cut child poverty nearly in half. BUT: The Child Tax Credit does almost nothing to address the underlying condition of a generation of Americans struggling with college debt, lower wages, and uncertainty about tomorrow. Graduating from college debt-free was a big help for me and my wife – we were able to begin our lives together looking forward, not backward, and start building a future right away. Most students are not in the position to make that choice. Attending college means going into debt. Today, 54% of all college students have debt, with an of over $37,000 each. The total student loan debt is $1.57 TRILLION --that's three times as much money as Bezos, Musk and Gates have combined! We are discussing a number of popular solutions to the students debt crisis, all of which I support: I am against charging interest on student loans. Yes, the president should cancel a significant portion of student debt, and Congress should follow suit. More importantly, we need to fix the system so future generations do not repeat these choices. That's where my concept of baby bonds and community service comes into play. Here are the highlights: At birth, each child receives $1,000 and gets annual deposits depending on their family's income compared to the poverty level. The funds can be applied to technical school, trades, college, or home buying after high school graduation. After receiving a high school or equivalent degree, young Americans are encouraged to spend a year in service receiving health coverage, pay, housing and meals; working on projects in other communities as well as learning civics, career planning and about each other. For all the details please visit . I've spoken to countless Pennsylvanians with tens of thousands in student debt. The problem is stagnating a generation of Americans, hurting our economy, threatening key programs like Social Security, and casting a dark shadow over our children's and grandchildren's future. As Pennsylvania's next Senator, I will focus 100% restoring the American Dream for everyone who calls this country home. But I can't do it alone, Peter. = In solidarity, John Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | PAID FOR BY MCGUIGAN FOR PA ---|--- | This email was sent by ** McGuiganForPA P.O. clean_body: | | | | | | | = | | | | = Friend — I was hoping I wouldn't have to send this email. But as someone so important to our team, I always want you to know exactly where we stand. In an ideal scenario, we'd be exactly halfway to our critical $10,000 end-of-month goal by yesterday. = Here's where the July books stand as of 9:00 AM this morning: | = After running the numbers, I'm confident we can do this. If enough folks can go just a little above and beyond, we’ll be back on track and in position to go on offense against the onslaught of misleading ads targeting Ron and the dark dollars attacks already flooding Wisconsin. With less than two weeks left until our deadline, here's how we close this gap: If even half of the people reading this can chip in, we'll be back on track and headed toward a strong finish to propel us forward. = | | | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | | | = = | = = | | | = = | = = | | | | There’s no doubt we can do this if we come together. We're counting on you now so Ron can hold this seat and continue fighting for Wisconsin families and the values we share. I can't express enough how much it means to have your support. Thank you for always doing your part to help Team Kind move Wisconsin forward. Sincerest thanks, Tawni Kind | | | | | | = = | | | To learn more about Ron Kind and moving Wisconsin forward visit . body:
We have to hold Virginia this year. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32690276/296563209/823540626?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDRjNDEzYi02YmU5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=piMxJVaCXg2KSOjG69tkbh3fky91J3UsFBbI_uKRBxI=&emci=224c413b-6be9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=244c413b-6be9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=1049176)
Peter, I get it — 2021 is supposed to be the “off year.” But up here in Virginia, our election for governor is _this_ November, just a few months away. And I’ll be honest: Democrats are up against a massive challenge. The Republican big-money machine is lining up to get behind my Trump-endorsed opponent, Glenn Youngkin. **My opponent has pledged to use his fortune to buy this race if necessary — he’s planning to spend $75 million to flip our state red and officially make Virginia “Trump country.” But here’s the worst part: He’s _already_ spending $2 million of his own money to put ads up on radio and TV.** We’re truly up against an unprecedented sum of money. Look, in Virginia’s last gubernatorial election, the Republican and Democratic nominees spent $66 million combined. [**We have to take on this spending — and we’ll do it with grassroots support. I need you to split a donation of any size between my campaign and Team Cooper _right now_ to help keep Virginia blue.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32690281/296563218/1150750638?refcode=em_RC_FR_McAuliffe_Tandem_2_072021_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDRjNDEzYi02YmU5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=piMxJVaCXg2KSOjG69tkbh3fky91J3UsFBbI_uKRBxI=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [SPLIT $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32690282/296563221/1150750638?refcode=em_RC_FR_McAuliffe_Tandem_2_072021_express10&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDRjNDEzYi02YmU5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=piMxJVaCXg2KSOjG69tkbh3fky91J3UsFBbI_uKRBxI=)

We won’t kid ourselves. With Glenn Youngkin’s massive war chest on his side, we’re up for a tough fight.**But we can’t afford to give up now.**
Virginia’s future is on the line.
If he’s elected, my opponent will side with the far right at every turn — in fact, he just admitted to _lying_ to Virginia voters about his views on Planned Parenthood and reproductive choice to seem _less_ extreme than he really is.
**If we’re going to defeat Youngkin and his far-right agenda, we need to take back the momentum _now._**
I know I can count on grassroots Democrats like you, Peter, to help me defeat radical conservatives in Virginia, North Carolina, and across the country.
**[Anything you can give will help fuel our fight. Click here to split a donation between Team McAuliffe and Team Cooper immediately>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32690287/296563226/1150750638?refcode=em_RC_FR_McAuliffe_Tandem_2_072021_L2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDRjNDEzYi02YmU5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=piMxJVaCXg2KSOjG69tkbh3fky91J3UsFBbI_uKRBxI=)**
Thanks,

clean_body: We have to hold Virginia this year. | Peter, I get it — 2021 is supposed to be the “off year.” But up here in Virginia, our election for governor is this November, just a few months away. And I’ll be honest: Democrats are up against a massive challenge. The Republican big-money machine is lining up to get behind my Trump-endorsed opponent, Glenn Youngkin. My opponent has pledged to use his fortune to buy this race if necessary — he’s planning to spend $75 million to flip our state red and officially make Virginia “Trump country.” But here’s the worst part: He’s already spending $2 million of his own money to put ads up on radio and TV. We’re truly up against an unprecedented sum of money. Look, in Virginia’s last gubernatorial election, the Republican and Democratic nominees spent $66 million combined. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = We won’t kid ourselves. With Glenn Youngkin’s massive war chest on his side, we’re up for a tough fight.But we can’t afford to give up now. Virginia’s future is on the line. If he’s elected, my opponent will side with the far right at every turn — in fact, he just admitted to lying to Virginia voters about his views on Planned Parenthood and reproductive choice to seem less extreme than he really is. If we’re going to defeat Youngkin and his far-right agenda, we need to take back the momentum now. I know I can count on grassroots Democrats like you, Peter, to help me defeat radical conservatives in Virginia, North Carolina, and across the country. = Thanks, Terry McAuliffe mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. name: Conservative Senate
subject: November 3rd Commission
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT
body:
Fellow Patriot:

The reason Democrats want a January 6th Commission
is not to find out what happened that day. All they really want
is to distract Americans from the true mystery: what happened on
November 3rd.

The 2020 election was the most controversial in our
lifetimes. Voting rules were changed, practically on the fly, by
legislatures, governors, and courts - sometimes within hours of
votes being counted. Because so many states changed so many rules
so quickly, we really don't know what happened behind the scenes.
One conservative wants to find out. Ohio Senate
candidate Josh Mandel is now calling for a "November 3rd
Commission."

Senate Conservatives Fund has endorsed Josh Mandel
in his primary against several establishment Republicans to
replace retiring Senator Rob Portman because Josh is the
strongest conservative in the race.

Please support Josh Mandel for U.S. Senate!

Josh has been fighting for conservative families and
principles his entire career. If nominated, he would be a strong
favorite to win this key battleground Senate race. And if
elected, he would immediately become one of the strongest,
toughest conservatives in Washington.

Josh is the worst nightmare for Washington liberals
in both parties. He is committed to securing rather than opening
our border, punishing instead of appeasing criminals, and
protecting our children from the bigotry of Critical Race Theory
and LGBTQ extremism.

Click here, and SCF will send 100% of your
contribution to Josh Mandel's Senate campaign!
Josh's November 3rd Commission would be tasked with
investigating:

▶︎ States that ignored voting laws because of
"public health";
▶︎ States that mailed unsolicited ballots to
voters; and,▶︎ States that did not secure their ballot box
chain of custody.

From the Commission's findings, it would recommend
election integrity reforms like voter ID, signature verification,
and ending unauthorized ballot harvesting.

Anyone who broke the law on January 6, 2021, is
already being prosecuted. So far, no one who broke the law on
November 3, 2020, is even being investigated. To change that, we
need leaders like Josh Mandel in the Senate, and an independent
commission to finally find the truth about what Democrats did
last election day.

Help elect Josh Mandel to the Senate today - to
fight the left and to find the truth!

Donate to Josh Mandel's Senate campaign now!

Thank you for considering this urgent request and
for doing so much to help us fight for America's future.

Sincerely,

Mary Vought
Executive Director
Senate Conservatives Fund

DONATE

Senate Conservatives Fund300 Independence Ave
SEWashington, DC 20003

Senate Conservatives Fund is a grassroots
organization that promotes conservative policies and helps elect
conservative candidates to the U.S. Senate. SCF was founded by
former Senator Jim DeMint to help the grassroots change
Washington.

Contributions to the Senate Conservatives Fund are
not deductible as charitable contributions. Contributions from
corporations or foreign nationals lacking permanent resident
status are not permitted. Federal law requires us to report the
name, mailing address, occupation and employer for each
individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a
calendar year. Not paid for at taxpayer expense.

PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT
AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE.
SENATECONSERVATIVES.COM

name: Cammack Research Team
subject: Biden 6 Month Performance Poll
body:
It has been a long 6 months for the Biden Administration.
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ArQcGT5cQ2mBb1fyX-EIwXKRhIwcwikMlfwUvUsJ3KDIxsE43IebvOvyIGEyVOr6dVS4GKVT2pGp0bO7DuloXDi117l_3ZGMFRI0nZk-od8OMudAz2J1XCt82_It99vo4Oyxof8r2GQssnDERVY5CGiXqHMioPe8orNbgLsVfR9bpg8g7dzUHZa210AUEyH6l-Xy6LR2kKK5xOVReVzXkg==&c=9hbaqdjetC-FFetaj9AVrqesLOroC_LNv7m9SCNJliTUKYYvfW5ylA==&ch=oGDVaBlSezkCRu7O-aTcFIW4t6YvHZzcZWvPTeOOyFhN6itaqkg_eQ==)
---
| Friend,

It has been a long 6 months for the Biden Administration. They have skated from one crisis to the next with no stop in sight. Whether it's the border crisis, a national crime wave, or attempts to socialize America, Biden is failing the American people that he was elected to serve.
We want to know your thoughts. Take our poll to let us know what you think of Biden's performance in his first 6 months as president.
---
| | | [TAKE THE POLL](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ArQcGT5cQ2mBb1fyX-EIwXKRhIwcwikMlfwUvUsJ3KDIxsE43IebvOvyIGEyVOr6dVS4GKVT2pGp0bO7DuloXDi117l_3ZGMFRI0nZk-od8OMudAz2J1XCt82_It99vo4Oyxof8r2GQssnDERVY5CGiXqHMioPe8orNbgLsVfR9bpg8g7dzUHZa210AUEyH6l-Xy6LR2kKK5xOVReVzXkg==&c=9hbaqdjetC-FFetaj9AVrqesLOroC_LNv7m9SCNJliTUKYYvfW5ylA==&ch=oGDVaBlSezkCRu7O-aTcFIW4t6YvHZzcZWvPTeOOyFhN6itaqkg_eQ==)
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ArQcGT5cQ2mBb1fyX-EIwXKRhIwcwikMlfwUvUsJ3KDIxsE43IebvOvyIGEyVOr6dVS4GKVT2pGp0bO7DuloXDi117l_3ZGMFRI0nZk-od8OMudAz2J1XCt82_It99vo4Oyxof8r2GQssnDERVY5CGiXqHMioPe8orNbgLsVfR9bpg8g7dzUHZa210AUEyH6l-Xy6LR2kKK5xOVReVzXkg==&c=9hbaqdjetC-FFetaj9AVrqesLOroC_LNv7m9SCNJliTUKYYvfW5ylA==&ch=oGDVaBlSezkCRu7O-aTcFIW4t6YvHZzcZWvPTeOOyFhN6itaqkg_eQ==)
---
| President Biden promised Americans that he would unite our country and end the partisan divide that is tearing our great nation apart. Instead, he has done nothing but pander to the Radical Left and continues down the path of socializing America.
We need new leadership, which is why we are working so hard to make sure the Biden Administration is held accountable for the terrible mismanagement of our government. It's time to stop the nonsense and get our country running at full steam again!

name: Gwen Moore
subject: We gotta fight for our right
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Gwen Moore for Congress
body:
_' 'As I've said before, the right to vote is the crown jewel of American liberties, and we will not see its luster diminished.'' _**This quote was from none other than Republican President Ronald Reagan in 1982** when he signed an extension of the Voting Rights Act of 1965 that included stronger provisions against discrimination than the original Act. Then why are members of the Party of Reagan working against these values?
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/tWVrspoA-DBnN58kXztV2BKFVOGHwJs2lzi_HQbKr40=/Sj3VEUPITDIL6_spZ19BbdlPFAiRO0KK6Gd0BIo6yIM=?refcode=071321)
Our voting rights are under attack. Because Democrats won the White House, took the Senate, and held the House, Republicans want to take away our right to vote. At least 250 new laws have been proposed in 43 states to limit mail, early in-person, and Election Day voting.
The 2020 election was the most secure in our history. We have come too far to allow voting restrictions that would unfairly target minorities and low-income areas. [_**Will you help me stand up to the Republican-backed voting measures that would create hurdles for tens of millions of voters?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/tWVrspoA-DBnN58kXztV2BKFVOGHwJs2lzi_HQbKr40=/Sj3VEUPITDIL6_spZ19BbdlPFAiRO0KK6Gd0BIo6yIM=?refcode=072021)

name: Roger Misso
subject: Show Mark Kelly that we have his back!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC
body:
Peter,

Here at Taking the Hill, we support veterans running for Congress - good candidates with integrity who are in tough races. With an onslaught of extremist figures working their hardest to suppress the vote in Arizona, few candidates face a tougher election than [_**Senator Mark Kelly.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/fQb1uLzmJ_Vvt5MoEwYxlFAYfZSHhIGvkR0PuU6KoYc=/zlGPih_VHH1ykQmhamv2sey89Sn_RXvdkJ1rESi81iw=)

Even though he's been to space, Mark is a down-to-Earth kind of leader. He is a warm, kind, and principled person of integrity - the kind of servicemember you want to deploy with, whether he's your wingman or next to you in the foxhole. Elected last year to serve the remaining two years of the late John McCain's term, Senator Kelly has done so with integrity.

Unfortunately, Mark's opponents are relying on a toxic cocktail of voter suppression, anti-immigrant fear-mongering, and outright lies to try to steal this Senate seat and swing the balance of power back to Mitch McConnell. Dark money is already exploding in this state, threatening to swallow everything in its path - [_**unless we can stop it.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/fQb1uLzmJ_Vvt5MoEwYxlFAYfZSHhIGvkR0PuU6KoYc=/zlGPih_VHH1ykQmhamv2sey89Sn_RXvdkJ1rESi81iw=)

We want to make sure Mark has what he needs to win, and I know you do as well. [_**For the next 24 hours, whoever donates at this link will have their donation matched 100% by**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/fQb1uLzmJ_Vvt5MoEwYxlFAYfZSHhIGvkR0PuU6KoYc=/zlGPih_VHH1ykQmhamv2sey89Sn_RXvdkJ1rESi81iw=)[ _** Taking The Hill up to a total matched amount of $2500! Will you help us give Mark a major boost by chipping in today?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/fQb1uLzmJ_Vvt5MoEwYxlFAYfZSHhIGvkR0PuU6KoYc=/zlGPih_VHH1ykQmhamv2sey89Sn_RXvdkJ1rESi81iw=)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/fQb1uLzmJ_Vvt5MoEwYxlFAYfZSHhIGvkR0PuU6KoYc=/zlGPih_VHH1ykQmhamv2sey89Sn_RXvdkJ1rESi81iw=)

Thanks for your support. We are so proud to have Mark Kelly as part of our Taking the Hill family!

In solidarity,
Roger

_Roger Misso
Executive Director
[Taking the Hill](https://act.myngp.com/el/fQb1uLzmJ_Vvt5MoEwYxlFAYfZSHhIGvkR0PuU6KoYc=/pdFTVSdu5JSHq05SFj5XAnekDRFiWl6bPn-q5rkgO1A=)_
[_@RogerMissoCNY_](https://act.myngp.com/el/fQb1uLzmJ_Vvt5MoEwYxlFAYfZSHhIGvkR0PuU6KoYc=/NP8VHVG3SwqaY7cwuAJ4zV_tAaqMejOnuzf-N0jBQBQ=)
To make a contribution, [click here](https://act.myngp.com/el/fQb1uLzmJ_Vvt5MoEwYxlFAYfZSHhIGvkR0PuU6KoYc=/4JG0x6cDjWC2eCYwEXZfbwBSIUjA-bEE02LInaWEqgE= "https://act.myngp.com/el/fQb1uLzmJ_Vvt5MoEwYxlFAYfZSHhIGvkR0PuU6KoYc=/4JG0x6cDjWC2eCYwEXZfbwBSIUjA-bEE02LInaWEqgE=").

name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: Please, friend, hear me out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
I want to explain why I’m about to ask you to pitch in
#

Team,
I want to explain why I’m about to ask you to pitch in a few bucks to my campaign for U.S. Senate. Will you hear me out?
Some folks think folks somebody like me can’t win in Pennsylvania. That a Black gay man from the North Philly projects could never become a U.S. Senator.
And a lot of folks say swearing off all money from corporate PACs is crazy.
**But I’m asking you to help me prove them wrong. Will you make a contribution to show the power of our campaign for working people today? Your donation helps us build a coalition of support for the long haul.**
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32698491/296577980/-353695395?refcode2=c0380890-73e9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210720-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDM4MDg5MC03M2U5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=92dfI_EMIAgDJfwfhgmea2M4qFcaEJQzo_2JboRA3Xg=)**
If we’re going to have healthcare for everybody, if we’re going to combat the climate crisis head-on, if we’re going to cancel student debt, if we’re going to deliver good union jobs as we recover from COVID-19, then we need more working people in the U.S. Senate.
I know what it’s like to work a minimum wage job, face a mountain of student loan debt, and struggle tooth and nail for stable housing.
So I’ve seen first-hand how Washington has failed folks like us, and I’m running to fight for working families like mine in the Senate.
But I can’t do it alone. Can I count on you to help me get there?
[If you can spare $3, I hope you’ll pitch in and help us continue growing our coalition of working people?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32698492/296577983/-353695395?refcode2=c0380890-73e9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210720-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDM4MDg5MC03M2U5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=92dfI_EMIAgDJfwfhgmea2M4qFcaEJQzo_2JboRA3Xg=)

clean_body: I want to explain why I’m about to ask you to pitch in Team, I want to explain why I’m about to ask you to pitch in a few bucks to my campaign for U.S. Senate. Will you hear me out? Some folks think folks somebody like me can’t win in Pennsylvania. That a Black gay man from the North Philly projects could never become a U.S. Senator. And a lot of folks say swearing off all money from corporate PACs is crazy. But I’m asking you to help me prove them wrong. Will you make a contribution to show the power of our campaign for working people today? Your donation helps us build a coalition of support for the long haul. = If we’re going to have healthcare for everybody, if we’re going to combat the climate crisis head-on, if we’re going to cancel student debt, if we’re going to deliver good union jobs as we recover from COVID-19, then we need more working people in the U.S. Senate. I know what it’s like to work a minimum wage job, face a mountain of student loan debt, and struggle tooth and nail for stable housing. So I’ve seen first-hand how Washington has failed folks like us, and I’m running to fight for working families like mine in the Senate. But I can’t do it alone. Can I count on you to help me get there? = = Thanks for helping us send a message, Malcolm * Paid for by Malcolm PAC Malcolm PAC PO Box 22395 Philadelphia, PA 19110 United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Flip the US Senate
subject: Soaring Inflation, rampant unemployment, rising crime -it’s time to make a change in Washington
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee
body:
The Biden administration has put America on the wrong path, and Maggie Hassan has done nothing about it

| | | | | [](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnew-hampshire-gop%2Fretire-hassan/1/0100017ac3ed2b06-cd017da3-5a96-444c-a587-3ba9becbe933-000000/eajXC17mPWlx1whyXP-zxATTZy0=227)
---
| | Derek,

Gas prices are soaring, crime is out of control, unemployment is rampant across the country, and _Maggie Hassan has nothing to say about it_.

Since taking office, Joe Biden has led America down the wrong path; meanwhile, our own senator continues to follow the party line, putting her own political career before the people of New Hampshire.
---
[](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnew-hampshire-gop%2Fretire-hassan/2/0100017ac3ed2b06-cd017da3-5a96-444c-a587-3ba9becbe933-000000/XH0NnbeBBr9iJXxoPEF2W_0GitE=227)

| They know that Maggie Hassan will do whatever she’s told, and that’s why they are spending whatever it takes to keep her in power. We need better leadership in Washington, and it starts right here in the Granite State.

Democrats control the Senate by only ONE VOTE. _We have the opportunity to put America back on the right track_ , but we will need your help to do so!

| | Folks, Elaine recently wrote a letter from all of her fellow women veterans in Congress to demand the Secretary of Defense save the Defense Advisory Committee on Women in the Services (DACOWITS). DACOWITS functions as an advocacy organization for women in the armed forces. Women are in the minority of U.S. service members, and face unique difficulties when it comes to recruitment, retention rates, gender discrimination, and transitioning home after their service concludes. | Peter,

name: Deandrea Newsome
subject: I admit this email is a little corny
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
This is how Erica is spending her time.
#
We talk a lot about how Erica Smith is different from the other U.S. Senate candidates in this Democratic primary. [**She’s the only candidate with a campaign platform that includes a Green New Deal, reparations, universal broadband, and Medicare for All (and you can donate here to support her right now).**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/5667?refcode=em20210720-270&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=270%2E3698%2EvcelRK)
**Well, here’s even more proof of what a unique candidate Erica is. Here is a photo of Erica preparing a simple meal with the corn she harvested by hand on her family farm — the same farm Erica was raised on, and her mother before her.**
[****](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/5667?refcode=em20210720-270&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=270%2E3698%2EvcelRK)
Unlike our opponents, Erica Smith doesn’t spend her time calling up ultra-wealthy, high-dollar Democratic donors and asking them for big checks.
Erica Smith doesn’t spend her time poll-testing fancy messages or catering to the special interests.
And Erica Smith doesn’t spend her time on the phone with Democratic consultants and establishment bigwigs.
That’s just who she is. Instead, **Erica is spending precious campaign time in North Carolina’s _actual_ rural farming communities, connecting with voters all across the state.** The proof is in the corn!
In fact, right now we're in the middle of our campaign's historic _100 Counties 100 Days Tour_. It’s an ambitious and time-consuming plan for sure, but Erica is determined to spend as much time as possible with the people she is hustling to represent. Our primary opponents can’t say the same.
We need all the help we can get, so I have to ask...
[**_Can you donate $5 or more to our official 100 Counties Gas Fund so that Erica Smith can keep spending time in North Carolina’s rural communities and in all 100 counties? While our opponents are committed to wealthy and well-connected donors,_**__**_Erica is uniquely committed to connecting with every single North Carolina voter._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/5667?refcode=em20210720-270&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=270%2E3698%2EvcelRK)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/5667?refcode=em20210720-270&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=270%2E3698%2EvcelRK)**
Thanks for hearing me out,
Deandrea Newsome
Campaign Chair, Erica Smith for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210720-270-footer&t=23&refcode2=270_3698_vcelRK&akid=270%2E3698%2EvcelRK)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=24&akid=270%2E3698%2EvcelRK)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=270%2E3698%2EvcelRK)

Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

Here's a sneak peak:
**FIRST:** The GOP used their trifecta to attempt to ram through a voter suppression bill that would directly impact voting rights in the top five largest counties -- including Austin by dictating the number of polling locations and voting machines and making it harder to vote in the most densely populated cities.

**THEN:** Because the GOP has a clear majority to pass bills, Democrats used their only available tool -- breaking quorum -- in order to stop the bill. We succeeded.

**NOW:** It's great that Texas Democrats are willing to risk arrest to stop this bad bill, but the ONLY way we truly win this for the long term is by defeating Republicans at the ballot box next year up and down the ballot. We must expand our narrow four-seat majority in the House, and that's why I'm running for a new congressional seat in Austin.
**[Our best shot at stopping voter suppression in Texas is by doubling down on the work we did last year to knock on 100,000 doors and turn out a record number of voters again. Will you watch my video, then pitch in $3 to help us stop voter suppression and flip Texas blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32704603/296600005/-1600748609?refcode=em-07202021-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MGMxNmUwZS04M2U5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UuCgHdjjQ4nwzfBLARoI9bTGm_zv8zXjZpyyhV-IceQ=)**

Donna

clean_body: I just got off Stuart Varney's show... | Peter, ENOUGH. We have to put our foot down now. The largest county in America -- Los Angeles County -- has just reinstated its mask mandate. As I told Stuart Varney on Fox Business, we must take action to STOP this senseless assault on our freedoms before it gets even worse. We have just filed court action in Los Angeles County. Thanks to President Trump's Operation Warp Speed, our country has made incredible progress navigating through this pandemic. But Democrats are eager to take our country back down the road of masks and lockdowns -- and not because they're 'following the science,' but because they want control. If we don't stop them from abusing their power in the largest county in the nation, other counties will follow quickly. This is their first step, we must stop them NOW. name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: Literal proof
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
250,000 donations is more than any other Senate challenger this cycle so far.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210720-2040-header&t=1&akid=2040%2E434096%2E2uunmQ)
Hey Peter, it's John.
So, exciting news. I just want to thank you for allowing our campaign to hit 250,000 individual donations today.
I’ll be honest with ya. This isn’t just some random number. **It’s kind of a big deal because 250,000 donations is more than any other Senate challenger this cycle so far.**
So on behalf of myself and Gisele, thank you, thank you, THANK YOU! 🙏
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/22446?refcode=em20210720-2040&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2040%2E434096%2E2uunmQ)
People like you have made our campaign a *true* grassroots movement here in Pennsylvania. Each donation is literal proof that you believe in our campaign for working people. And each donation is literal proof that you believe in me. I’m overwhelmed with gratitude. 😭
But look... If we want to keep breaking more fundraising records, opening more campaign offices, hiring more organizers, and the rest of the whole nine yards it’s gonna take to win Pennsylvania’s Senate seat, then we MUST keep up our momentum. **We simply can’t afford to let fundraising slow down now — especially not during July, a notoriously tough month for online fundraising.**
[**_If you’re in a place to do so, will you please make a donation of $5 or more to our campaign today? We managed to reach 250,000 donations through collective action, now let’s keep this amazing momentum going._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/22446?refcode=em20210720-2040&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=2040%2E434096%2E2uunmQ)
**[Donate $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/22446?refcode=em20210720-2040&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=2040%2E434096%2E2uunmQ)**
Thanks for all you do,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
P.S. According to our records _< checks notes>_ you haven’t donated to our campaign yet this month. Well, July isn’t over yet and we could really use your help, Peter. The *only* way we’ll keep growing our movement is through small-dollar, online donations. [**_Can I count on you to make a $5 donation to our campaign this month?_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/22446?refcode=em20210720-2040&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=2040%2E434096%2E2uunmQ)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210720-2040-footer&t=24&refcode2=2040_434096_2uunmQ&akid=2040%2E434096%2E2uunmQ)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

name: Mark Warner
subject: Add your name: Let Americans control their social media data
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Without any meaningful regulation, a couple giant platforms have tremendous power over our economy, our private data, and how our kids experience the Internet.

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32706020/296604905/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGFjNmIwMC04NWU5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SYbftvpwa5Gt4Q272AyZC7enXwpT2F2lQk0k38ieqpY=&emci=9ada20ed-78e9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=d0ac6b00-85e9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek, Like a growing number of Americans, I’ve been increasingly concerned with the fact that a few big social media companies dominate the vast majority of our time online. Without any meaningful regulation, a couple giant platforms have tremendous power over our economy, our private data, and how our kids experience the Internet. And because those companies own our personal data, it’s hard for new platforms with better services and privacy features to compete. That’s why I introduced bipartisan legislation called the ACCESS Act, that would give Americans more control and choice when it comes to social media. Competition and choice are important for consumers, good for our economy, and essential for reining in social networks’ potential for abuse. The ACCESS Act would require social networks to give you more control over your data so that it’s easier for you to switch networks. **_[Add your name if you agree that you should control your social media data.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32706021/296604907/-285932074?ms=mw_em_210720_1&refcode=mw_em_210720_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGFjNmIwMC04NWU5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SYbftvpwa5Gt4Q272AyZC7enXwpT2F2lQk0k38ieqpY=&emci=9ada20ed-78e9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=d0ac6b00-85e9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=4568237)_** Requiring social networks to make your data portable might sound far-fetched, but we’ve done it before with phone numbers. When Congress required phone companies to make phone numbers portable between networks, it increased competition. The internet is a bit more complicated, but the technology to make data portable already exists. The ACCESS Act would also increase competition by making it possible to communicate across networks. You can email people who don’t use the same email provider -- you should be able to communicate with people who use other social networks too. **Social media has huge benefits, but we’ve also seen that when a few companies so thoroughly dominate our internet use, one company’s mistakes can have major societal consequences.** **_[Sign on now if you want more control over your social media data and more competition between social media networks.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32706023/296604908/-285932074?ms=mw_em_210720_1&refcode=mw_em_210720_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGFjNmIwMC04NWU5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SYbftvpwa5Gt4Q272AyZC7enXwpT2F2lQk0k38ieqpY=&emci=9ada20ed-78e9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=d0ac6b00-85e9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=4568237)_** Our laws need to keep up with our technology in ways that allow for continued innovation while ensuring new technology works for us. The ACCESS Act is one of nearly two dozen ideas I’m working to advance that would help us adapt. Thank you for joining me in the fight to make technology a force for good in our lives, Mark Warner **[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32706024/296604909/269599283?ms=mw_em_210720_1&refcode=mw_em_210720_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGFjNmIwMC04NWU5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SYbftvpwa5Gt4Q272AyZC7enXwpT2F2lQk0k38ieqpY=)**

* * *

Williamsburg, VA 23185

And because those companies own our personal data, it’s hard for new platforms with better services and privacy features to compete. | | Friend - For months, our team at Fair Fight—along with supporters like you—have been urging Senators to pass legislation to protect the right to vote.

That’s why I’m thrilled to announce that our friends at Resistance by Design have put their creativity into a summer necessity—the beach towel. Check out the [Hot Call Summer beach towels](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32706196/296605721/-648461797?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmE3NGU4OS04NWU5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qgrfIATyqxWd3fNMz10_BVa2Q0NmkPRmSXU8gEVdadI=&emci=d5b84612-77e9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=22a74e89-85e9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=1037277)! [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32706197/296605722/-648461797?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmE3NGU4OS04NWU5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qgrfIATyqxWd3fNMz10_BVa2Q0NmkPRmSXU8gEVdadI=&emci=d5b84612-77e9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=22a74e89-85e9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=1037277) These towels commemorate the spirit of this moment as well as those immutable words that bind all Americans together––We the People.

We wanted you to be the first to get your hands on one of these towels, [so get yours today](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32706198/296605723/-648461797?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmE3NGU4OS04NWU5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qgrfIATyqxWd3fNMz10_BVa2Q0NmkPRmSXU8gEVdadI=&emci=d5b84612-77e9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=22a74e89-85e9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=1037277)!

Fair Fight Action’s Hot Call Summer campaign is all about a holistic expansion and protection of our freedom to vote: reducing long lines at the polls; protecting vote by mail; ending partisan gerrymandering; stopping threats to election workers and voter intimidation; safeguarding the will of voters in elections and so much more. So grab your towel—right AFTER you call your Senators at 888-453-3211 to tell them to act today!

[Consider buying a towel for yourself or a friend](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32706199/296605724/-648461797?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmE3NGU4OS04NWU5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qgrfIATyqxWd3fNMz10_BVa2Q0NmkPRmSXU8gEVdadI=&emci=d5b84612-77e9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=22a74e89-85e9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=1037277) to support Fair Fight! Stay safe, stock up on the sunscreen, call 888-453-3211 every single day this summer and soak up the sun with us this Hot Call Summer. Again, thank you, friend, for your continued partnership in this crucial fight to protect our democracy.

-Stacey Abrams |

clean_body: Order your beach towel today Fair Fight | | | Friend - For months, our team at Fair Fight—along with supporters like you—have been urging Senators to pass legislation to protect the right to vote. That’s why I’m thrilled to announce that our friends at Resistance by Design have put their creativity into a summer necessity—the beach towel. Check out the ! These towels commemorate the spirit of this moment as well as those immutable words that bind all Americans together––We the People. We wanted you to be the first to get your hands on one of these towels, ! Fair Fight Action’s Hot Call Summer campaign is all about a holistic expansion and protection of our freedom to vote: reducing long lines at the polls; protecting vote by mail; ending partisan gerrymandering; stopping threats to election workers and voter intimidation; safeguarding the will of voters in elections and so much more. So grab your towel—right AFTER you call your Senators at 888-453-3211 to tell them to act today! to support Fair Fight! Stay safe, stock up on the sunscreen, call 888-453-3211 every single day this summer and soak up the sun with us this Hot Call Summer. Again, thank you, friend, for your continued partnership in this crucial fight to protect our democracy. -Stacey Abrams | ---|---|--- | 1270 Caroline Street Suite D120-311 Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2021 Fair Fight PAC - All rights reserved. Contributions to Fair Fight PAC are not tax-deductible. | | Paid for by Fair Fight PAC, www.fairfight.com. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
