name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: get outside and enjoy our national parks!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/p_wTbuVSG9xJmy2R6JR8lv_nuTT95PyI_WgORlPudPg=/Ge97B0luFaneShLUusA89-gue-yd1AbowyyuHKbF2o8=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20210720-1-EM&amount=25)
---
| Peter,

I'm writing to you today to tell you about the [_**" Every Kid Outdoors" program**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/p_wTbuVSG9xJmy2R6JR8lv_nuTT95PyI_WgORlPudPg=/3otheWh_afF5UpEjRdO99qSW0Fak1soCp5Vv1c7O4KU=). The initiative is a federal program meant to encourage 4th-grade students and their families to experience and enjoy our nation's public lands and waters.

For the entire year, starting September 1st, 4th-graders can sign up to get their very own [_**Every Kid Outdoors pass**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/p_wTbuVSG9xJmy2R6JR8lv_nuTT95PyI_WgORlPudPg=/3otheWh_afF5UpEjRdO99qSW0Fak1soCp5Vv1c7O4KU=). This pass gives children and their families free access to the millions of acres of public lands across the country!

Students who take advantage of the Every Kid Outdoors pass can get free access to Virginia's own **Shenandoah National Park**. It is certainly worth a trip to check out some of the rocky hiking trails and stunning overlooks. Or, families can use their pass to travel to our neighboring state of West Virginia and visit one of the parks most recently elevated to the honor of "National Park" -- the **New River Gorge National Park and Preserve**!
---
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/p_wTbuVSG9xJmy2R6JR8lv_nuTT95PyI_WgORlPudPg=/3otheWh_afF5UpEjRdO99qSW0Fak1soCp5Vv1c7O4KU=)
_Shenandoah National Park in Virginia_
Our national parks are American treasures, and getting an opportunity to visit one always reminds me of how important it is to protect our public lands and the hikes and trips I enjoyed as a kid. Generations to come should have the same opportunities we do to enjoy these magnificent places.

If a friend or family member is approaching 4th grade soon, please feel free to share information with them about the Every Kid Outdoors program so they too can have free access to our nation's national parks. [_**If you want to learn more about the initiative, you can click here.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/p_wTbuVSG9xJmy2R6JR8lv_nuTT95PyI_WgORlPudPg=/3otheWh_afF5UpEjRdO99qSW0Fak1soCp5Vv1c7O4KU=)
| [LEARN MORE ](https://act.myngp.com/el/p_wTbuVSG9xJmy2R6JR8lv_nuTT95PyI_WgORlPudPg=/3otheWh_afF5UpEjRdO99qSW0Fak1soCp5Vv1c7O4KU=)
---
Whether you are eligible for the program or not, I encourage you to get outdoors as much as possible. Hopefully, we all have the chance to visit a new national park sometime soon!

Best,

Abigail

* * *
| | [ ](https://act.myngp.com/el/p_wTbuVSG9xJmy2R6JR8lv_nuTT95PyI_WgORlPudPg=/Ge97B0luFaneShLUusA89-gue-yd1AbowyyuHKbF2o8=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20210720-1-EM&amount=25)

---
| Paid for by Spanberger for Congress

Glen Allen VA 23058 United States

The news coming out of Georgia is beyond incredible.

According to the just-released report:
* **In Fulton County, the hand recount was wrong by 60%**
* **100,000 tally sheets for ballots were missing**
* **They duplicated thousands of extra votes for Joe Biden**
* **They fabricated vote counts of 100 -0 for Biden, many times!**

I warned you this would happen, Peter. What else will they find once the full Forensic Audit takes place?

body:
#

Friends — we have two very exciting pieces of information to share with you!
#1: The House Appropriations Committee just approved $50 million to double the federal investment in gun violence research at the CDC & NIH.
#2: The House Appropriations Committee just approved a historic $200 million in new funding for community violence intervention programs across the country.
Now these investments in gun violence prevention are HISTORIC and a product of years of activism and tireless work behind the scenes on behalf of so many people.
However, our work isn’t done yet.
These lifesaving initiatives were passed by a House committee but still need to be voted on and passed by Congress. It’s going to take a lot of resources to get Congress to act. So here’s where you come in, friend:
[**If you are able, will you chip in $3 to help us put pressure on Congress to vote on and pass these life saving initiatives? Together we can secure funding for gun violence research and prevention and save lives.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-july21?refcode=em210720-1-15&t=1&refcode2=362_3935704_NinYnF&akid=362%2E3935704%2ENinYnF)

clean_body: Friends — we have two very exciting pieces of information to share with you! #1: The House Appropriations Committee just approved $50 million to double the federal investment in gun violence research at the CDC & NIH. #2: The House Appropriations Committee just approved a historic $200 million in new funding for community violence intervention programs across the country. Now these investments in gun violence prevention are HISTORIC and a product of years of activism and tireless work behind the scenes on behalf of so many people. However, our work isn’t done yet. These lifesaving initiatives were passed by a House committee but still need to be voted on and passed by Congress. It’s going to take a lot of resources to get Congress to act. So here’s where you come in, friend: If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | For far too long, Congress put the political agenda of the gun lobby over our nation’s public health and safety. But today, Americans are demanding solutions to gun violence and with a new gun safety majority elected to Congress, change is happening. clean_body: But not if you don’t help! | Listen, Peter... The 2022 midterms have already begun. Democrats are plotting their next attacks on Red States like Florida at this very moment! The next election will define the future of our nation. Whether we embrace President Trump’s America First policies , or cave to the Radical Left and the Socialists -- the choice is up to YOU. NO battleground state is more pivotal to our success than Florida. Trump-Endorsed Senator Marco Rubio must win re-election if we’re going to defeat the Left! | | | | | | President Trump isn’t going anywhere. He’s NEVER going to stop fighting to SAVE AMERICA. But he’s counting on your help, Peter. Even President Trump can’t Keep Florida Red on his own. | Thank you. Republican Senate Alerts Sent via Elect Republicans

Friend,

With current Lt. Governor Mandela Barnes formally announcing his run for US Senate, the crowded field of liars, cheaters, and far left liberals also in the running just increased. Barnes will soon find himself knee deep in catfights with none other than Wisconsin's "best" \-- current State Treasurer and resume embellisher Sarah Godlewski, New York trust fund baby Alex Lasry, and with other hopefuls who are planning to trip over themselves to prove who is the most liberal.

**Far-left elites like Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer are recruiting liberals left and right to try to turn Senator Ron Johnson's Senate seat blue.**
**Maintaining Senator Ron Johnson's seat is imperative if Republicans want to regain the majority in the Senate and effectively push back against Biden 's liberal policy agenda. **We're gearing up for 2022, and we need your support now to show the Democrats that we are ready to fight.

Hi Peter,

**I gotta be honest: I’m having mixed feelings right now. **
The good news is that we ended the second quarter having still outraised our Trump-Republican opponent for the cycle so far. This is absolutely unheard of in the campaign world! Derek—a first-time candidate—is out campaigning a sitting member of Congress at every single turn.
He’s doing it all while refusing corporate money because he wants to be a fighter for the people instead of a puppet for the ruling class. What worries me is that we’re only $4,000 ahead, and Trump-insurrectionist Jay Obernolte is closing in fast—thanks to his corporate backers as well as his own deep pockets!
_**Luckily, Derek has you.[Can you donate $18 right now to help us stay ahead of our multi-millionaire opponent?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32710423/296621894/474536728?refcode=07-20-21&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDZmN2MxNC05NWU5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xpOE8uWxuXXtj7517OXKQlWXmFD6HbZ5xAJx-hdWLos=)**_

**Last cycle alone, he loaned his campaign over $1 million in his quest to forge the laws of our nation on behalf of the billionaire class. **
So, now you know what we’re up against, and it’s precisely why we need your help.
**It is so important that we keep our fundraising numbers up so that we can keep going toe-to-toe with an ultra-wealthy aristocrat and his 1% buddies.**** **

The good news is that we ended the second quarter having still outraised our Trump-Republican opponent for the cycle so far. This is absolutely unheard of in the campaign world! Derek—a first-time candidate—is out campaigning a sitting member of Congress at every single turn. He’s doing it all while refusing corporate money because he wants to be a fighter for the people instead of a puppet for the ruling class. What worries me is that we’re only $4,000 ahead, and Trump-insurrectionist Jay Obernolte is closing in fast—thanks to his corporate backers as well as his own deep pockets! Luckily, Derek has you.= Obernolte’s getting so desperate, in fact, that he’s willing to pour millions of dollars from his own personal bank account into this race. All to keep a champion for the working class like Derek out of the halls of Congress. Last cycle alone, he loaned his campaign over $1 million in his quest to forge the laws of our nation on behalf of the billionaire class. So, now you know what we’re up against, and it’s precisely why we need your help. It is so important that we keep our fundraising numbers up so that we can keep going toe-to-toe with an ultra-wealthy aristocrat and his 1% buddies. = In Solidarity, Cody Hoskins Campaign Manager, Derek Marshall for Congress * = Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress. P.O. Box 2836, Victorville, CA 92395 • (760) 486-2416

body:
I’m sure you’ve heard, but the Democrats are coming after you.

&nbs; p; &zw; nj; &n; bsp;
|
---
| | | _**" We're flagging problematic posts for Facebook that spread disinformation."**_ -Press Secretary Jen Psaki
Friend,

I'm sure you've heard, but the Democrats are coming after you. And they're not alone with Big Tech on their side. President Biden's press secretary even said so. Democrats censor conservatives for supposed "incitement of violence" yet have no problem with actual terror groups on social media.

---
| | [FIGHT CENSORSHIP BEFORE IT'S TOO LATE](https://track.washingtonguardian.org/link.php?AGENCY=tv&M=1060046&N=18200&L=35933&F=H& "fight censorship")
---

Conservatives need to be on the defense, but we can't do this without you. **[Stand with GOP governors like Ron DeSantis and help fight Big Tech.](https://track.washingtonguardian.org/link.php?AGENCY=tv&M=1060046&N=18200&L=35933&F=H& "Stand with GOP
governors like Ron DeSantis and help fight Big Tech.")**

Like he said, Big Tech are **" enforcers of preferred narratives..."**

---
| | [WE NEED YOU TO STOP BIG TECH](https://track.washingtonguardian.org/link.php?AGENCY=tv&M=1060046&N=18200&L=35933&F=H& "we need you to stop big tech")
---

**The majority of voters agree big tech companies have too much political power, which is why we NEED GOP govs speaking up for conservative voices.**
**[We need YOU in this fight. Without our freedom of speech, this isn't America.](https://track.washingtonguardian.org/link.php?AGENCY=tv&M=1060046&N=18200&L=35933&F=H& "We need YOU in this
fight. Without our freedom of speech, this isn’t America.")**

Thank you for your help,

RGA

---

name: Marco Rubio
subject: I hate that I am writing this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
I just can’t believe this. We had so many people reach out... [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c210%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=X2sFMF5w9uu%2b5YZ%2b5dQdKQ&sysid=1)
I just can't believe this.
|
---
| | | Friend,

I just can’t believe this.

We had so many people reach out...

From Donald Trump Jr. to Mike Pompeo to Elise Stefanik to my Political Director, Matt, we had SO many people take time to chat with you about my Quarter 2 deadline.

While our results were good, my opponent’s results were better. I can’t believe I am saying this, but she actually outraised me since she launched her campaign in June. She was able to raise $4.6 MILLION in record time.

I am so disappointed. I really thought Team Marco was stronger than this.

We can’t let this happen again. If we fall any further behind, we risk losing everything we worked so hard to achieve the past four years. Her numbers just GOT released, and even though I’m a little worried, I know we can work hard to surpass my opponent’s numbers in Quarter 3. July and August have historically been slow, but that doesn’t mean we can’t prove those trends wrong. Now is the time to get started, we can’t afford to waste any more time.

_**[I need YOU, Friend.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4251%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GGEzHXajdnutDnlxi%2fSMHg&sysid=1 "I need YOU, Friend. ")**_

Please consider chipping in and fighting back against Nancy Pelosi and her Impeachment Manager Puppet that are **DETERMINED** to flip Florida **BLUE**.

---
| | [STAND WITH ME TODAY](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4252%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xO5ACccNt9atZ9Amq7audg&sysid=1 "STAND WITH ME TODAY")
---

Thank you for taking the time to hear me out. I know I can count on you.

Marco Rubio

---
|
---

| Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate

name: Pat Fallon
subject: Peter, our elections are under attack!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fallon for Congress
body:
Democrats are fighting against election integrity

[](http://tracking.fallon4texas.com/f/a/DWajko4bKlkPBMvWEi0C-A~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRi2Xn8P0UgMTU4NzMzYTZlNjlmMDcwNGNhMjlhMzk1ZjY1ZDU3ZThEOmh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vZmFsbG9uLWZvci1jb25ncmVzcy90eGRlbXMtY2F0Y2hXBXNwY2V1Qgpg8Pz09mBJ_AtTUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAYFw~~)
Peter,

By now, I’m sure you’ve heard about the Texas Democrats fleeing the Legislature and running into the welcoming arms of the progressive D.C. Dems.

As a reminder, here’s what’s going on: Gov. Abbott called the Texas Legislature is in a Special Session to take up a number of issues. One of the bills being debated is the **_Texas election integrity bill that clarifies existing laws, makes it harder to commit voter fraud, and easier to legally vote. That is literally what the bill does. Any reasonable person shouldn’t find that objectionable._**

However, the **progressive Democrats aren’t reasonable people.** Making up all sorts of wild and baseless lies such as the typical “racism,” “voter suppression,” and “modern day Jim Crow,” the **Texas Dems packed up their charter bus with beer, went to the airport, hopped on a private jet, and flew off to D.C.** in hopes of getting the woke D.C. Dems and weak Joe Biden to pass a very dangerous bill that will expand federal control over state election laws. [**_We must stop them!_**](http://tracking.fallon4texas.com/f/a/DWajko4bKlkPBMvWEi0C-A~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRi2Xn8P0UgMTU4NzMzYTZlNjlmMDcwNGNhMjlhMzk1ZjY1ZDU3ZThEOmh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vZmFsbG9uLWZvci1jb25ncmVzcy90eGRlbXMtY2F0Y2hXBXNwY2V1Qgpg8Pz09mBJ_AtTUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAYFw~~)

[**> > DONATE TO DEFEND TEXAS’ ELECTIONS! <<**](http://tracking.fallon4texas.com/f/a/DWajko4bKlkPBMvWEi0C-A~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRi2Xn8P0UgMTU4NzMzYTZlNjlmMDcwNGNhMjlhMzk1ZjY1ZDU3ZThEOmh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vZmFsbG9uLWZvci1jb25ncmVzcy90eGRlbXMtY2F0Y2hXBXNwY2V1Qgpg8Pz09mBJ_AtTUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAYFw~~)

Here’s a photo of the Texas Dems on their private jet. They actually thought it was a good idea to post this online. **Isn’t it also kind of curious how they suddenly don’t care about carbon footprints or wearing masks?!**[**_> > Stop the liberal hypocrisy!_**](http://tracking.fallon4texas.com/f/a/DWajko4bKlkPBMvWEi0C-A~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRi2Xn8P0UgMTU4NzMzYTZlNjlmMDcwNGNhMjlhMzk1ZjY1ZDU3ZThEOmh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vZmFsbG9uLWZvci1jb25ncmVzcy90eGRlbXMtY2F0Y2hXBXNwY2V1Qgpg8Pz09mBJ_AtTUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAYFw~~)

This week, **we have found out that six of these Dems tested positive for COVID!** We wish them a speedy recovery and a quick return to work in Austin.
** **

**The woke Democrats are the very last people who should be in control of making federal election law.** They want to push their radical agenda on a disapproving American public and violate states’ rights.

**A full 80% of Americans support voter-ID.** Woke Democrats not only want to get rid of voter-ID, but they want to lower the voting age to 16...be honest, do you think you should have been voting at 16? **Not only do they want to prevent ineligible voters from being removed from voter lists, they also want to mandate that every voter on those voter rolls get mailed a ballot. This is a recipe for massive voter fraud!**

The whole range of Democrat broken logic is on full display with this one issue. And it is a critical issue. **If Democrats get their way, our elections will be LESS SAFE and the results of all American elections would be in doubt.**
** **
Look, it’s absolutely critical that we stop this Democrat disaster and take back Congress before it’s too late. **We can’t let them federalize elections and prevent states like Texas from implementing smart laws that encourage legal voting and _protect election integrity!_**

I know we can do it, but I’m going to need the help of you and your fellow grassroots patriots. [**_Will you contribute $25, $50, $100, or whatever you can afford, so that I can continue fighting Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden?_**](http://tracking.fallon4texas.com/f/a/DWajko4bKlkPBMvWEi0C-A~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRi2Xn8P0UgMTU4NzMzYTZlNjlmMDcwNGNhMjlhMzk1ZjY1ZDU3ZThEOmh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vZmFsbG9uLWZvci1jb25ncmVzcy90eGRlbXMtY2F0Y2hXBXNwY2V1Qgpg8Pz09mBJ_AtTUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAYFw~~) So much is at stake, and I’m grateful for your support.

For Texas and America,

Pat Fallon
You received this email because you subscribed to our list. You can [unsubscribe](http://tracking.fallon4texas.com/f/a/dpsvJPij9CrdWYNW9_TnAA~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRi2Xn8P4QWAWh0dHBzOi8vYXJib3Jlc2NlbnMuZW9tYWlsNi5jb20vdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU_~) at any time.
Paid for by Fallon for Congress
PO BOX 614, CELINA, TX, 75009, United States of America

name: Brian Hawkins
subject: I'm a threat to the Democrats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hawkins for Congress
body:
I'm Black, Conservative, Back the Blue and Protect the 2nd Amendment and I am running for Congress. I'm Black, Conservative, Back the Blue and Protect the 2nd Amendment and I am running for Congress. |
---
Fellow Conservative, allow me to introduce myself....

My name is Brian Hawkins - I grew up in poverty, on welfare in the inner-city, and what's more, I'm an EX-FELON turned pastor, father of three and city councilman. **Now, I'm running for Congress.**

**[In a moment, I am going to ask you to contribute just $5 or $10 to my campaign before my fundraising deadline on July 31st](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c6d7d2f7ce174c559772cbf8c0891dcc&_e=0sRxDfDc5llaRg2kgMfta2NRMIIYq8zZ6vX6SPuGKnS_CeM3Fmmszw2g1FF_kaV-mDHV5AoZyFkvFtOQuWCkAXo2vBKB3-9BX0vAWwrqm6PyPDm-cOO4Wp_R2kNebV37CuXfFNs7P_fVZ-Yitz6UdcYl2KvXaVARBgjdzTtun_zwhK-fgcuJ4lP8a0tPxycybU9eHxtLNvHjHzpcJwKaFvmJo2qIqIvZd06rKbIMxTeRsi1PztWG-h-JKt8FqZGK0Bs_l5Eut4ReLNEFg9_ejpXEuRDWfTwJhZVN2zHf_a_9W8CDPshOrn-jwDlimmXe-4R6D1BguQpe5MoxOupvFyWVsbMOOKvPSs-_TCBq0YImPumY8vdtayhQLXLVnPvUC6mQOLmJ3MEdECOpzOf-47WbiSGh4LKJMtquhB18OXRbUr1Y6MhmWMrSBkUua_Y_WQPhh2_Jja2ODSHMZVJ_QR20q5adF6iOPpSjq9eMQLM%3D)** - **but first, you need to know why my campaign for Congress is DANGEROUS to Democrats like Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden...**

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c6d7d2f7ce174c559772cbf8c0891dcc&_e=0sRxDfDc5llaRg2kgMfta2NRMIIYq8zZ6vX6SPuGKnS_CeM3Fmmszw2g1FF_kaV-mDHV5AoZyFkvFtOQuWCkAXo2vBKB3-9BX0vAWwrqm6PyPDm-cOO4Wp_R2kNebV37CuXfFNs7P_fVZ-Yitz6UdcYl2KvXaVARBgjdzTtun_zwhK-fgcuJ4lP8a0tPxycybU9eHxtLNvHjHzpcJwKaFvmJo2qIqIvZd06rKbIMxTeRsi1PztWG-h-JKt8FqZGKgzZ5qC2y_Dhv2FiD5gx8uO9l2JnKCXCr07Rs0wTyGiBQbQhtg0Cq7mWsBRAtQCRdSftppXXFs57qePoFUOYdpKfWsSxMc2xA63qsHnO9-pOUDWq_y5q9LgWVsatkz3vvdY9T6yF8Vzy88GOa_gCBDm6vrl-FDmSd1wDICYUwb6vmwsIQQOxkoz5mCui9yXmo4LG5OUCHZ-k9BqB-mUFgs8SI5ZjG4GO-jnbs5HRkscE%3D)
**I'm Black. I'm Conservative. I Back the Blue.
I Protect the 2nd Amendment. I am Pro-Life.**
I am the _exact_ type of Republican that threatens the radical-Left's narrative about conservatives and destroys their stronghold on minority communities - **[My candidicy is dangerous to the future of the Democrat Party.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c6d7d2f7ce174c559772cbf8c0891dcc&_e=0sRxDfDc5llaRg2kgMfta2NRMIIYq8zZ6vX6SPuGKnS_CeM3Fmmszw2g1FF_kaV-mDHV5AoZyFkvFtOQuWCkAXo2vBKB3-9BX0vAWwrqm6PyPDm-cOO4Wp_R2kNebV37CuXfFNs7P_fVZ-Yitz6UdcYl2KvXaVARBgjdzTtun_zwhK-fgcuJ4lP8a0tPxycybU9eHxtLNvHjHzpcJwKaFvmJo2qIqIvZd06rKbIMxTeRsi1PztWG-h-JKt8FqZGKudTdB_sc2ZC-oR8LrWSZ_Hz3DJw7EVA03KoKHmMjay777kKe0hhMqFM283b3ZVSVakDQDnKZI4mzUeYBIrkblrsgOfBfBfLQNCFe8VOhdPVCYdDpSB6Vw80wdRTtQoUHB3QXkGNH3DLvxgZPq5pO6tmabCqcjkEDMFip3OttPZMFjE1qRvmkwcd0InR0NvI2phFk9TkSADxhub4S2pQFh8ce-3778ZmYz075VYe4aIs%3D)**

The Left believes I'm a victim because of my race. But I'm a free-thinking American blessed with so much opportunity. **[That's why I'm running for Congress](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c6d7d2f7ce174c559772cbf8c0891dcc&_e=0sRxDfDc5llaRg2kgMfta2NRMIIYq8zZ6vX6SPuGKnS_CeM3Fmmszw2g1FF_kaV-mDHV5AoZyFkvFtOQuWCkAXo2vBKB3-9BX0vAWwrqm6PyPDm-cOO4Wp_R2kNebV37CuXfFNs7P_fVZ-Yitz6UdcYl2KvXaVARBgjdzTtun_zwhK-fgcuJ4lP8a0tPxycybU9eHxtLNvHjHzpcJwKaFvmJo2qIqIvZd06rKbIMxTeRsi1PztWG-h-JKt8FqZGKuTvimjANv5XIS_YRwdB6WZlrhNghELUR5q1V5-rBH5X9GOiRNTKk0EblTquXyV0P0MA7ow1nY0jjjI3WLSc0QGLzvN2YNdDTIjNSckUbmDfZmvcyLxWsRyl8lHpu4sQYhVH6HNSxrWTo0hVcoH5_EaHEAhtGo_lQvTEW7Kj5XNOfvTFh7lvyaqXjKKKhqchuaXvPwpZL1FIcVUhhZgf0Ot0rwXgzSMZuj1awRBeiwiY%3D)** to stop the generations of victimhood in the black community, to show that the Republican Party _is_ the party of diversity and inclusion.

subject: Mark needs our help today

body:
#

**FIRST:** This month, CNN named us one of the Senate seats most likely to flip in 2022.
**THEN:** A new Republican candidate announced that they are running against Mark in 2022 — and they have a $10 million Super PAC backing their campaign.
**NOW:** We’re working around the clock to hit our 40,000 contribution goal by the end of the month. Time is running out, so we have to buckle down in these final days.
**If we can keep up the momentum and hit this goal, it’ll show our opponents that we’re serious about keeping Mark in the Senate and holding this seat. So here’s the part where we ask:**

name: Alex Padilla
subject: I am proud to have worked with Senator Bernie Sanders on a budget that will have a major impact on American families. Will you sign my petition and tell the Senate you support this $3.5 trillion investment in the middle class?
body:
[1]Alex Padilla for Senate

Friends ––

Last week, my Democratic Colleagues and I on the Senate Budget Committee
negotiated an agreement on a $3.5 trillion budget resolution — making this
the biggest investment in the middle class in decades.

I was proud to join committee Chairman Bernie Sanders in crafting a bold,
progressive budget that will profoundly improve the lives of American
families.

This budget will create jobs, help rebuild our infrastructure, take action
on climate, provide a pathway to citizenship for millions of immigrants,
and expand Medicare to cover vision, dental, and hearing.

Look, these are major victories for American families and
they’re the very reason why voters put Democrats in the majority in the
first place — to improve people’s lives.

Now, our focus is on getting all Democrats and the rest of the Senate
onboard, which is where you come in.

[ https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/Budget-Petition/?source=em210720-1-15&t=1001&akid=170%2E159979%2En2Dedp ]Please sign my petition and tell my colleagues in the Senate that you
support this $3.5 trillion investment in the middle class. This is
important, and your support will have such a big impact in this moment.

[ https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/Budget-Petition/?source=em210720-1-15&t=1002&akid=170%2E159979%2En2Dedp ]ADD YOUR NAME

The American people elected Democrats to the majority and they expect that
we will deliver on our promises. That’s why, every day, I’m working to
reform our immigration system, make health care universal, and address the
climate crisis.

This budget will help achieve those goals, and let me quickly explain why
I support it so strongly:

I support this budget because now is the time for us to think big, not
small — but the truth is that the path forward will not be easy. We will
be taking on some powerful special interests who want to stop us, which is
why it is so important that we take action now.

[ https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/Budget-Petition/?source=em210720-1-15&t=1003&akid=170%2E159979%2En2Dedp ]So please, sign my petition if you support this $3.5 trillion
investment in the middle class. With your help, we can get this done and
deliver even more support to the American people.

If we’re going to have any hope of putting our bold progressive agenda to
work, we need to pass a budget that reflects our values.

Thank you in advance for standing with me today on this critically
important issue.

Warmly,

—Alex

[ https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/Budget-Petition/?source=em210720-1-15&t=1004&akid=170%2E159979%2En2Dedp ]ADD YOUR NAME

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.alex-padilla.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=170%2E159979%2En2Dedp

| I’m sure you’ve seen the news that liberal members of the Texas legislature have fled the state to avoid passing common-sense voter protections. This is just the latest Democrat stunt aimed at creating disinformation around measures designed to protect our elections from fraud. Let’s be clear: **this act of performance theater is right out of the Nancy Pelosi playbook.** When I was in the Iowa State Senate, I led the effort to pass a common-sense Voter ID law that ensures every legal citizen has the right to vote, while still maintaining the integrity of our elections. Now in Congress, I’m fighting every day to make sure Nancy Pelosi doesn’t get her way with federally controlled elections. Nancy Pelsoi and her liberal allies are using the 2020 election as a tool to grab oversight of our locally controlled elections. **It is unprecedented and it has to be stopped.** [_I need you to help me fight back by sending a clear message to Nancy Pelosi (and her cronies from Texas) that Americans demand secure elections._](http://link.email.dynect.net/link.php?DynEngagement=true&H=qJ9juQrYQnx6GiLoZRCFRfx5vplALQMA1LebiplKf4js5R%2BwvBYsJ2ABry6LU79UrTp%2FfwqT0EXCD6S0DVhJeVakEKNWMkagc6bM8n%2FzYB2HVz7UI793j%2BWuS9Ak5ift&G=0&R=https%3A%2F%2FPHDQG4ZTGNA.hatchbuck.com%2FTrackLinkClick%3FID2%3Dts49wBP1oBK5D_aqr2Ej-2QvoxCMML8eEOyAeWIO548x3x4n8ytICWHIznMNKnmT0&I=20210720171346.000000031cf6%40mail6-42-ussnn1&X=MHwxMjcwODUwOjE5NjkyNTcwMzk7MXwxMjcwODUxOjE2NjczNjQ4NTs%3D&V=3&S=8U-vpemZ2Lcteg_uOxL7nCsKOzmq1aVhTE08vPWD_7M)

name: Nikki Fried
subject: Let’s take a step back
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Dear Friends—

In a moment, I’m going to ask for you to make a donation to our campaign. First, I want to take a step back and explain why this race is so important.

The past few weeks have laid bare the need for strong leadership in Florida. From rising COVID cases to the red tide, we’re dealing with multiple crises that require immediate action.

So naturally, Governor DeSantis spent the weekend in Texas in an attempt to score political points for his 2024 run for President.

I’m disappointed, but I’m not surprised. For decades, Floridians have suffered under governors who care far more about their own political ambitions than about moving our state forward.
I’m running to do something new: put Floridians first instead of political ambition and special interests. Together, I know we can break this corrupt system that has elevated politicians like Ron DeSantis and left the rest of us behind.

This fight won’t be easy: DeSantis and Republicans across the country are lined up to stop us. But with your help, I know we can win. Please click here to support our campaign today if you’re able. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-nf-big-stakes]

Governor DeSantis has been behind on every environmental crisis, played on vaccine hesitancy to score political points, and absent when Floridians need him most.

Every day, there’s a new reason he should be a one-term governor. I hope you’ll join me in the fight to stop him.

Please click here to donate and support our campaign if you’re in a position to do so. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-nf-big-stakes]

Warmly,
Nikki

Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
Nikki Fried for Governor
6619 S Dixie Hwy
No. 148
Miami, FL 33143
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/fab154a6-fde8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7/0530e7f4-9fe9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTMwZTdmNC05ZmU5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KfEVCnbBKT2ZaQfSCoaTRiFUcNqHH7X9p93-HRPveDY=&id=116879433 .

body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32714028/296635204/459488397?refcode=jas_headerlogo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDhlYzdlZS1hMWU5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mNPXSNTs_DhPEZurVMg0H0n5LQn_F3rRkdISyvQAaJk=)

| | Peter, in this race, it’s easy to know what we’re against. Madison Cawthorn’s brand of far-right extremism is appalling. **But what we’re _for_ is even more important. That’s why we want to check in with you.** Jasmine is an organizer to her core. She’s ready to connect with voters from all across Western NC, and that starts now: **[tell Jasmine what issues you care about most with our one-minute issue survey!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32714029/296635205/1282415216?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDhlYzdlZS1hMWU5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mNPXSNTs_DhPEZurVMg0H0n5LQn_F3rRkdISyvQAaJk=&emci=7f4b1193-97e9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=248ec7ee-a1e9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=22032259)** | | | [I care about... ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32714030/296635206/1282415216?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDhlYzdlZS1hMWU5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mNPXSNTs_DhPEZurVMg0H0n5LQn_F3rRkdISyvQAaJk=&emci=7f4b1193-97e9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=248ec7ee-a1e9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=22032259)

As a County Commissioner, Jasmine has built bipartisan coalitions to pass big legislation to improve early childhood education, address the opioid crisis, and provide paid family leave. She’s going to keep fighting for these causes -- and a whole lot more.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32714009/296635160/1793776944?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGY0ODNjNi1hMWU5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mj_USHkVOEk312tEnf9CbMwfPi1QSFk6FvkvIEmrmeM=&emci=e3a11cb1-96e9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=d0f483c6-a1e9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=1037277)

| | Friend- With the recent Supreme Court decision further weakening the protections of the Voting Rights Act, the urgent need for federal action to protect our freedom to vote is greater than ever. **That’s why Fair Fight Action officially [relaunched our Hot Call Summer campaign](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32714010/296635161/401685288?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGY0ODNjNi1hMWU5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mj_USHkVOEk312tEnf9CbMwfPi1QSFk6FvkvIEmrmeM=&emci=e3a11cb1-96e9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=d0f483c6-a1e9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=1037277)!** We need to keep turning up the heat on Congress so they know that we need them to pass the For the People Act. For the next few weeks, we’ll be reaching out every Tuesday to share the latest and most important messages for you to emphasize when calling your Senators, and we’ll be hosting weekly events with some very special guests to help make clear just what’s at stake. **Please join us Thursday, July 22 at 8pm ET with Earthgang and additional Special Guests — tune in on our[Facebook](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32714012/296635162/1773934834?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGY0ODNjNi1hMWU5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mj_USHkVOEk312tEnf9CbMwfPi1QSFk6FvkvIEmrmeM=&emci=e3a11cb1-96e9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=d0f483c6-a1e9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=1037277), [Twitter](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32714013/296635163/-438117422?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGY0ODNjNi1hMWU5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mj_USHkVOEk312tEnf9CbMwfPi1QSFk6FvkvIEmrmeM=&emci=e3a11cb1-96e9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=d0f483c6-a1e9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=1037277), or [YouTube](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32714015/296635164/-1082701765?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGY0ODNjNi1hMWU5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mj_USHkVOEk312tEnf9CbMwfPi1QSFk6FvkvIEmrmeM=&emci=e3a11cb1-96e9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=d0f483c6-a1e9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=1037277) channels for our first event since we’ve re-launched Hot Call Summer!** This week, we’re focusing on removing barriers to the ballot box so that all eligible voters can make their voices heard. Below are some bits of information you can share when talking about the For The People Act. _**What to Say To Your Senators **_ _Our freedom to vote is on the line, and that’s why I’m asking you to do everything you can to make sure S1, the For The People Act passes. We need this legislation to head to the President’s desk without delay. _ **Want some more information?** Feel free to share the following with your Senators: _**It’s critical that you prioritize provisions to address barriers to the ballot box.** Ensuring every eligible voter is able to cast their ballot means three things:_
* _**Protecting and expanding vote by mail,** including offering prepaid postage, requiring ballot drop boxes, and requiring states to track and confirm the receipt of ballots._
* _**Reducing long lines at the polls** by extending early voting and expanding vote by mail_
* _**Preventing polling location closures** , especially in communities of color and rural communities _

Keep reading for more information to share! **In 2020, more than 65 million Americans voted by mail** , with only five states requiring an excuse to do so. Despite bipartisan support for mail voting, anti-voter lawmakers across the country are trying to erect barriers to vote by mail.
* **That’s why no-excuse voting by mail is a minimum standard of access that must be available to all eligible voters.**
* We need to be moving forward, not backward, by continuing to protect and expand mail-in voting so that all voters are able to cast their ballots without unnecessary barriers.

**Long lines—whether the result of negligence or incompetence—are a pernicious component of voter suppression** , and disproportionately force Black and brown voters to wait for hours, exposed to the elements, and at the expense of their time, income, health, and constitutional rights.
* In 2020, voters suffered and jeopardized their health, waiting in line to vote up to over an hour and a half in Kentucky, 3 hours in Wisconsin, 4 hours in Pennsylvania, 6 hours in Texas, 7 hours in Nevada and 11 hours in extreme weather in Georgia.
* These closures disproportionately harm Black and brown voters, who already face the greatest barriers to casting a ballot.
* When a voter has to travel long distances, miss work, secure childcare and transportation, or wait in line for hours, it’s clear our institutions have failed. No voter should be forced to choose between casting a ballot and affording to feed their family.
* In 2016, [about half a million](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32714017/296635165/-252228997?file=/wp-content/uploads/2019/03/Improving-The-Voter-Experience-Reducing-Polling-Place-Wait-Times-by-Measuring-Lines-and-Managing-Polling-Place-Resources.pdf&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGY0ODNjNi1hMWU5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mj_USHkVOEk312tEnf9CbMwfPi1QSFk6FvkvIEmrmeM=&emci=e3a11cb1-96e9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=d0f483c6-a1e9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=1037277) eligible voters did not vote because of polling place problems, including long lines. This is unacceptable. **We need federal action to combat this by extending early voting and making vote by mail more accessible. **

We’ll be back next week with more ways to turn up the heat! **And please join us Thursday, July 22 at 8pm ET with Earthgang and additional Special Guests — tune in on our[Facebook](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32714018/296635166/1773934834?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGY0ODNjNi1hMWU5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mj_USHkVOEk312tEnf9CbMwfPi1QSFk6FvkvIEmrmeM=&emci=e3a11cb1-96e9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=d0f483c6-a1e9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=1037277), [Twitter](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32714019/296635167/-438117422?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGY0ODNjNi1hMWU5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mj_USHkVOEk312tEnf9CbMwfPi1QSFk6FvkvIEmrmeM=&emci=e3a11cb1-96e9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=d0f483c6-a1e9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=1037277), or [YouTube](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32714021/296635168/-1082701765?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGY0ODNjNi1hMWU5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mj_USHkVOEk312tEnf9CbMwfPi1QSFk6FvkvIEmrmeM=&emci=e3a11cb1-96e9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=d0f483c6-a1e9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=1037277) channels!** Thank you for your support and activism, Team Fair Fight Action |

Ensuring every eligible voter is able to cast their ballot means three things: Protecting and expanding vote by mail, including offering prepaid postage, requiring ballot drop boxes, and requiring states to track and confirm the receipt of ballots. Reducing long lines at the polls by extending early voting and expanding vote by mail Preventing polling location closures , especially in communities of color and rural communities Keep reading for more information to share! In 2020, more than 65 million Americans voted by mail , with only five states requiring an excuse to do so. Despite bipartisan support for mail voting, anti-voter lawmakers across the country are trying to erect barriers to vote by mail. That’s why no-excuse voting by mail is a minimum standard of access that must be available to all eligible voters. We need to be moving forward, not backward, by continuing to protect and expand mail-in voting so that all voters are able to cast their ballots without unnecessary barriers. Long lines—whether the result of negligence or incompetence—are a pernicious component of voter suppression , and disproportionately force Black and brown voters to wait for hours, exposed to the elements, and at the expense of their time, income, health, and constitutional rights. In 2020, voters suffered and jeopardized their health, waiting in line to vote up to over an hour and a half in Kentucky, 3 hours in Wisconsin, 4 hours in Pennsylvania, 6 hours in Texas, 7 hours in Nevada and 11 hours in extreme weather in Georgia. These closures disproportionately harm Black and brown voters, who already face the greatest barriers to casting a ballot. When a voter has to travel long distances, miss work, secure childcare and transportation, or wait in line for hours, it’s clear our institutions have failed. No voter should be forced to choose between casting a ballot and affording to feed their family. In 2016, eligible voters did not vote because of polling place problems, including long lines. This is unacceptable. We need federal action to combat this by extending early voting and making vote by mail more accessible. We’ll be back next week with more ways to turn up the heat! And please join us Thursday, July 22 at 8pm ET with Earthgang and additional Special Guests — tune in on our, , or channels!** Thank you for your support and activism, Team Fair Fight Action | ---|---|--- | 1270 Caroline Street Suite D120-430 Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2021 Fair Fight Action - All rights reserved. Contributions to Fair Fight Action are not tax-deductible. | | Paid for by Fair Fight Action

Fellow Conservative,

My name is John Castorani and I’m running against one of the most vulnerable House Democrats up for reelection next year in Virginia’s 7th District. I’m a father, husband, and proud veteran of the intelligence community.

Last month I started raising funds online for my U.S. House campaign – **which is sure to be one of the most expensive in the country when all is said and done** – and as I have the habit of doing with people I’ve never met before I wrote about who I am (**former intelligence officer**) and why I’m running for Congress (**to hold career politicians of both parties accountable**). It just so happens that in my career as an intelligence officer I was part of the team who hunted the terrorists that attacked the American compound in Benghazi, Libya, resulting in the death of Ambassador Chris Stevens. **This particular mission consumed six years of my life, so naturally it’s a story I want to share with people. **

Well, Kellyanne Conway’s husband George think’s it’s cheeky to attack a military veteran (**me**) for sharing a story about a series of events that played a pivotal role in the man I am today.

[](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=953faa2cf4f04d6098ad6356949cdf56&_e=oPCOhIO1Aae1sNb989e-DH5E5ulWquxR5bsOwvHbf9cfPWQ7G5IXrfteKB9ADq0DwOUrS82ZVAjl8BtznvjS0LWEYAE_raDlUX7L3dvGCDfKxY614QTXBwBTNDhq51g8fTIrLLfX9-7AM4KgAzQjtoLdj4WvzUwEZZ32e_RPeP2BJVoZvX_5pZ9r1NmQ56X1lQeqJudmGpTt4Wi9zrCm0qpV-3R-0WQaAhajmSQoxByJZEPZQ212osVRY0GV7GjmVPYzTXY-xuFvOkPMEhoj84s946-vxX1tx7eYF-XEfJnveNT1AkOok3EqdKSHLr6IIoBLXWa5Al-Y5JkfEtmaV77wKB8Zp89RqMIGCKkBHbvm11y59XJ6lAYPsMa5ZDGRYO7nDQHBUJE4uqrKRwiY7AG1gAA6-vg0Y17_xNNx82i9Y3a82dW473sAwuCl5vRqOdZtJIvhPCM0zL3KTcLJP4E7dY0sBcvc6Lcx8we5jEs%3D)

| [**STAND WITH ME AGAINST THE DC ELITE

Fellow Conservative, I know exactly the date, hour, and second the Benghazi attacks took place. I talk about Hillary Clinton to highlight an individual we all know who didn’t adequately discharge the duties of her office.

**I’m just a proud American running for Congress out of a sense of patriotism and duty, and without provocation, Washington insiders start to attack me over an email**.

George Conway doesn’t know me. He simply wants to tear down any Republican running for office.

It’s particularly rich coming from the founder of the Lincoln Group. Those in glass houses should not throw stones.

I knew that attacks like this would come – it’s a part of running for office. I just didn’t know they would start this early in the cycle. So, if you can, **[I would appreciate any help you’re able to give today in the form of a small donation to my efforts to win back Virginia’s 7th district for the Republican Party.](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=953faa2cf4f04d6098ad6356949cdf56&_e=oPCOhIO1Aae1sNb989e-DH5E5ulWquxR5bsOwvHbf9cfPWQ7G5IXrfteKB9ADq0DwOUrS82ZVAjl8BtznvjS0LWEYAE_raDlUX7L3dvGCDfKxY614QTXBwBTNDhq51g8fTIrLLfX9-7AM4KgAzQjtoLdj4WvzUwEZZ32e_RPeP2BJVoZvX_5pZ9r1NmQ56X1lQeqJudmGpTt4Wi9zrCm0qpV-3R-0WQaAhajmSQoxByJZEPZQ212osVRY0GV7GjmVPYzTXY-xuFvOkPMEhoj80N-8GN3sKhBSMuCNU17t2BuIqj5Zt8wmudFq0zO5aOZxqOO7_LLUXf1X-B13o_ZobB1_aWdZ2OpNOdliiI-3kqvcDdeb5pqGq-C__Q_OD1-k4IKDOVfxM_wNzjN_Yt_yQ_TKAZKclqLmZZGWK9cd2MJE1AlmJxZoxXgMp7pZLcFHTHIx_dwZ3iPgFgJtjHRXjRqeHRuOZ7_3cQei86iv0k%3D)**

body:
This is serious. Mitch McConnell made it clear that if the GOP takes back control of Congress, he’d prevent President Biden from filling a Supreme Court seat if given the chance.

Mitch McConnell made it clear that if the GOP takes back control of Congress, he’d prevent President Biden from filling a Supreme Court seat if given the chance.

McConnell will do anything to continue the Supreme Court’s dangerous push to the right. We saw how he blocked the 2016 nomination of Merrick Garland and then hypocritically moved forward with the appointment of Justice Amy Coney Barrett in 2020 just 38 days before the election.

With an already conservative majority, we have to take action **_now_** to protect the integrity of the Supreme Court.

[We need 600 activists to sign on right now in support of a Supreme Court that defends access to health care, Roe v. Mitch McConnell made it clear that if the GOP takes back control of Congress, he’d prevent President Biden from filling a Supreme Court seat if given the chance. | | This is serious. Mitch McConnell made it clear that if the GOP takes back control of Congress, he’d prevent President Biden from filling a Supreme Court seat if given the chance. McConnell will do anything to continue the Supreme Court’s dangerous push to the right. We saw how he blocked the 2016 nomination of Merrick Garland and then hypocritically moved forward with the appointment of Justice Amy Coney Barrett in 2020 just 38 days before the election. With an already conservative majority, we have to take action now to protect the integrity of the Supreme Court. | | Our country is supposed to have a system of checks and balances in place, and we need a strong Supreme Court to defend the rights of all Americans. That’s why we must do everything we can to prevent Mitch McConnell from having the power to stall President Biden’s legislative agenda, including appointing a new Supreme Court justice if the time comes. We’re proud to have you on our team while we take on this challenge to protect the Democratic majority in the Senate and stop McConnell’s agenda. Friend,

We are witnessing a defining moment in the history of Cuba and their citizens' fight for freedom.

Thousands of Cubans took to the streets this past week to protest food shortages, lack of medicine, and surging prices for basic necessities due to the coronavirus.

Despite the persistent threat of persecution these brave men and women face every day, they have come out across the entire island to demand their right to live in a free and democratic Cuba -- where people can not only survive but thrive.

My own parents fled Cuba in the pursuit of freedom and a better life for our family. As a Cuban-American with family still living in Cuba, I know firsthand how the regime has used violence and oppression to silence its people. I've had difficulty in the last few days reaching my extended family members in Cuba. The government has shut down power, turned off access to reliable internet, and even restricted the ability of Cubans to receive much needed supplies from outside the island.

**This must end.** We must continue to stand in solidarity with Cubans who are fighting against an authoritarian regime that continues to stifle them at every turn.

\-- Bob Menendez [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32714791/296637468/-1961580945?refcode=em21_210719_cuba_IN&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Njg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjc3N2I1NS1hNWU5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dxuvFKnTjaFRGyinvpJCB1GiKJ9ezWRyivk1qJzFXz4=)

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Tom_Cotton=E2=80=99s_book?=
subject: Congrats, patriot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
We’ve giving You a signed copy of Tom Cotton’s book, Sacred Duty | **YOU WON, Fellow American!**
---
Fellow American,

You’re not going to believe what we have _just for you._

You’re a freedom-loving American patriot who stands for _**our flag and our values,**_ and that’s why you deserve a truly special and unique gift.

Fellow Conservative -

I know how far away the midterm election seems, but the truth is, the Democrats are acting like it is TOMORROW. **The Democrat Machine is building a robust ground campaign in Arizona right now, doing the early work needed to defeat me in 2022.**

[**That's why today, I am reaching out to every valuable member of the American conservative movement, asking that they endorse my campaign for re-election immediately.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=bd4d3e2a6add4bd28db95fe1c399f0ae&_e=O7BhGuFpzCCBRyM8TlJn8PE2fFaPQ7uZ-qUlWUDoPZebabfhTmymy6BuZyuHpFlZHLDBIdoC72N8SXVPyt2_Mtxt19_bGsHs744x2MZwmPISd74S0nYsTZugOg9zNZGDntRWC9YLinhsgn1ULOy-zTQRZyL68HlJ_hxEzFB0-tVE_inHFvTooGKuPSWprnt7JeRpno6mfGdT06FRl0YiWG9aCwduAAptyBiRj2OoyUG1jqbdeh16gr51jrvfMxTzI36sgsFuOGpBMeVK2Cpwls1-zqZsw4flDrGeW3ynNLIwdoCBkvRtYTqP_y1K_tWRzbSbrdArM3KLDx57oL7nzgJNEvgG0Ln8myhKjg1zfaCD031noqMfyGNA3lNhRmGbP61IyQYa0lflURtaAKl2Op172qSSH8VlrvzlwFWP11N2Kwnplg3YyEvN4nAU3Cik8zvvF67nKyCNFmt8YCCSYxjO7DheyopgJghy_R3q3Zfras3W2FgCdvLISJaztukWlo3KApytJiQwdXvnC61wWuZ3poOlsImozjankXfgYl1c6FaRKH9tHZWYttQUIY5m)

In 2018, I defeated the Democrats in not one but TWO close races, first in a Special Election and then again in November. Then, I defeated the Democrats in 2020 - despite their ability to flip remaining parts of Arizona blue.

**This was a huge accomplishment that took a lot of hard work and grassroots financial support,** [**especially from supporters like you.** ](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=bd4d3e2a6add4bd28db95fe1c399f0ae&_e=O7BhGuFpzCCBRyM8TlJn8PE2fFaPQ7uZ-qUlWUDoPZebabfhTmymy6BuZyuHpFlZHLDBIdoC72N8SXVPyt2_Mtxt19_bGsHs744x2MZwmPISd74S0nYsTZugOg9zNZGDntRWC9YLinhsgn1ULOy-zTQRZyL68HlJ_hxEzFB0-tVE_inHFvTooGKuPSWprnt7JeRpno6mfGdT06FRl0YiWG9aCwduAAptyBiRj2OoyUG1jqbdeh16gr51jrvfMxTzI36sgsFuOGpBMeVK2Cpwls1-zqZsw4flDrGeW3ynNLIwdoCBkvRtYTqP_y1K_tWRzbSbrdArM3KLDx57oL7nzgJNEvgG0Ln8myhKjg1zfaCBjYXezG36h4AskkqSVeJ504xJc75YYAmvFPFd1T6wKB9mAl7VP9BlMUwKMHCavKFkw-dXmDYIrjgCyulWV7tRA7xSNAq0JCmRbzyVXCTOUMIai1VR8s8ThoeH2c7ES05YZ2AO4Z-kdXRgVduSMNtQna7tRuJJnoS7ApWg166CB134-75dUDeV5511-Zud2kR7YjBX5qVOrATuyAJ0Sr69)

[**That's why receiving your endorsement today is so important, Fellow Conservative.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=bd4d3e2a6add4bd28db95fe1c399f0ae&_e=O7BhGuFpzCCBRyM8TlJn8PE2fFaPQ7uZ-qUlWUDoPZebabfhTmymy6BuZyuHpFlZHLDBIdoC72N8SXVPyt2_Mtxt19_bGsHs744x2MZwmPISd74S0nYsTZugOg9zNZGDntRWC9YLinhsgn1ULOy-zTQRZyL68HlJ_hxEzFB0-tVE_inHFvTooGKuPSWprnt7JeRpno6mfGdT06FRl0YiWG9aCwduAAptyBiRj2OoyUG1jqbdeh16gr51jrvfMxTzI36sgsFuOGpBMeVK2Cpwls1-zqZsw4flDrGeW3ynNLIwdoCBkvRtYTqP_y1K_tWRzbSbrdArM3KLDx57oL7nzgJNEvgG0Ln8myhKjg1zfaCHYbLJseRSwuYS8OqvApyfUhEHz0vn-7OXVYq4Wr54CSwGywY7DvZw3MMtYWM7Gx048bHjfmilLOIcgopMPci0Z3tMXIFfULzcvLMdPoFpFPZu3c1SLhuiWa4SJjgWq0sXRsbsU3DsZynJlr8EqHsgYqUqxhBwIphKpSQy_3522Dvbx_MIeB7kpOl9ngyqSy9GKR0pLUVrCrrvMyhEnvBi) **By adding your name, you'll show your support for me and my Republican allies in Washington who are fighting for your conservative values.**

[**Will you take a short moment to add your name to the growing list of American patriots who have endorsed my re-election campaign?**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=bd4d3e2a6add4bd28db95fe1c399f0ae&_e=O7BhGuFpzCCBRyM8TlJn8PE2fFaPQ7uZ-qUlWUDoPZebabfhTmymy6BuZyuHpFlZHLDBIdoC72N8SXVPyt2_Mtxt19_bGsHs744x2MZwmPISd74S0nYsTZugOg9zNZGDntRWC9YLinhsgn1ULOy-zTQRZyL68HlJ_hxEzFB0-tVE_inHFvTooGKuPSWprnt7JeRpno6mfGdT06FRl0YiWG9aCwduAAptyBiRj2OoyUG1jqbdeh16gr51jrvfMxTzI36sgsFuOGpBMeVK2Cpwls1-zqZsw4flDrGeW3ynNLIwdoCBkvRtYTqP_y1K_tWRzbSbrdArM3KLDx57oL7nzgJNEvgG0Ln8myhKjg1zfaDMhaCu3s1u4jj4CyeElaSYk-HwZR7XDTrJHolDDVe4G2tdsDF_z-Fs6h7h6kzcdwciazmDwHU8W4pgASkXjysJFz70Wlq4mjD4TYpKDuNt2q9nTFK1TczwhlCy1x-n6qtHUbRQTcPwejedXPp0JM0TsSCgN5GBSh-xNOX57IaG4pWdIt9zPKxIoFVBUQPX1v4br7bUJkPp2HsYvyepfFym)

Having your support not only means a lot to me but shows the Democrat Machine that I have an army of grassroots conservatives behind my re-election campaign.

[**Your endorsement today will make all the difference leading up to Election Day.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=bd4d3e2a6add4bd28db95fe1c399f0ae&_e=O7BhGuFpzCCBRyM8TlJn8PE2fFaPQ7uZ-qUlWUDoPZebabfhTmymy6BuZyuHpFlZHLDBIdoC72N8SXVPyt2_Mtxt19_bGsHs744x2MZwmPISd74S0nYsTZugOg9zNZGDntRWC9YLinhsgn1ULOy-zTQRZyL68HlJ_hxEzFB0-tVE_inHFvTooGKuPSWprnt7JeRpno6mfGdT06FRl0YiWG9aCwduAAptyBiRj2OoyUG1jqbdeh16gr51jrvfMxTzI36sgsFuOGpBMeVK2Cpwls1-zqZsw4flDrGeW3ynNLIwdoCBkvRtYTqP_y1K_tWRzbSbrdArM3KLDx57oL7nzgJNEvgG0Ln8myhKjg1zfaD_b1scWsOlz_k94c_dycsmCk72wvouFmIRveWXPnpE1cfPNdUW9cHCAqhAS-moa1HlAvXEzxE43ueQmtEazauvKrI31jq2hZKttDqBBHyvmzP9L1x5QSH5X0fXOC7XxrsZp2bvjbYnfmhidp29C_xTwNmEnspvhoe0jHwoegHzILcB6sJEBu94gtyNg4irdCgf_1SHPMyy0APDwPyBmjgc)

clean_body: I am reaching out to every valuable member of the American conservative movement, asking that they endorse my campaign for re-election immediately. I am reaching out to every valuable member of the American conservative movement, asking that they endorse my campaign for re-election immediately. | Fellow Conservative - I know how far away the midterm election seems, but the truth is, the Democrats are acting like it is TOMORROW. The Democrat Machine is building a robust ground campaign in Arizona right now, doing the early work needed to defeat me in 2022. In 2018, I defeated the Democrats in not one but TWO close races, first in a Special Election and then again in November. Then, I defeated the Democrats in 2020 - despite their ability to flip remaining parts of Arizona blue. This was a huge accomplishment that took a lot of hard work and grassroots financial support, My conservative voice and presence in Washington have never been more important than it is right now, Fellow Conservative. I am actively challenging the most radical presidency in American history, which is why the Democrats have identified me as the Republican to beat in November. By adding your name, you'll show your support for me and my Republican allies in Washington who are fighting for your conservative values. Having your support not only means a lot to me but shows the Democrat Machine that I have an army of grassroots conservatives behind my re-election campaign. God Bless, Debbie Lesko (R-AZ) | | Debbie Lesko currently serves as a U.S. Congresswoman for Arizona's 8th District. name: Sara Jacobs
subject: We have to raise the minimum wage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
It’s long past time we gave struggling families and heroic workers a raise.

| | | **Minimum wage workers can't afford rent anywhere in America**

_-CNN, July 15, 2021_
---
As we work toward a recovery from this pandemic, we have a responsibility to rebuild our economy in a way that gives everyone a fair shot.

For too long, the minimum wage in our country has been unlivable. Millions of frontline workers have put their lives on the line to feed us, care for us, and keep us safe, all while making poverty wages. It’s long past time we gave struggling families and heroic workers a raise.

In the richest country in the history of the world, no one should have to lose sleep over how to feed their children, pay their rent, or afford their medication. Now, a report from the National Low Income Housing Coalition has confirmed that there is nowhere in the country where a worker earning a minimum wage salary for 40 hours a week can afford a two-bedroom apartment — and only in 7% of counties across the country would they be able to afford a one-bedroom apartment. **That is unacceptable.**

The last time Congress raised the federal minimum wage was in 2007, marking the longest time in the 82-year history of the federal minimum wage that Congress has gone without passing legislation to raise it. Here in California, we know that every worker deserves the dignity of a livable wage. **That’s why I’m so proud to be an original co-sponsor of the Raise the Wage Act of 2021** , a bill that would raise the federal minimum wage to $15 an hour and end the subminimum wage for tipped workers — which is currently just $2.13 an hour.

**In order to keep making progress on crucial issues like raising the federal minimum wage, Democrats have to keep our majority in the House — that means we can’t afford to lose a single seat.**

[_**Can you chip in today to help with my re-election campaign and ensure I have the resources to win in 2022? clean_body: It’s long past time we gave struggling families and heroic workers a raise. | | | Minimum wage workers can't afford rent anywhere in America -CNN, July 15, 2021 As we work toward a recovery from this pandemic, we have a responsibility to rebuild our economy in a way that gives everyone a fair shot. For too long, the minimum wage in our country has been unlivable. Millions of frontline workers have put their lives on the line to feed us, care for us, and keep us safe, all while making poverty wages. It’s long past time we gave struggling families and heroic workers a raise. In the richest country in the history of the world, no one should have to lose sleep over how to feed their children, pay their rent, or afford their medication. Now, a report from the National Low Income Housing Coalition has confirmed that there is nowhere in the country where a worker earning a minimum wage salary for 40 hours a week can afford a two-bedroom apartment — and only in 7% of counties across the country would they be able to afford a one-bedroom apartment. That is unacceptable. The last time Congress raised the federal minimum wage was in 2007, marking the longest time in the 82-year history of the federal minimum wage that Congress has gone without passing legislation to raise it. Here in California, we know that every worker deserves the dignity of a livable wage. That’s why I’m so proud to be an original co-sponsor of the Raise the Wage Act of 2021 , a bill that would raise the federal minimum wage to $15 an hour and end the subminimum wage for tipped workers — which is currently just $2.13 an hour. In order to keep making progress on crucial issues like raising the federal minimum wage, Democrats have to keep our majority in the House — that means we can’t afford to lose a single seat. = | | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Sara Jacobs * | | = Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress Sara Jacobs for Congress PO Box 120085 San Diego, CA 92112 United States | = If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please

body:
As a black female, I dared to have my own views, I defy what is expected of me from the Democrat party and step out of line to express my conservative Democrats know that they can no longer use physical force to enslave black Americans like they once did. Now, they use false accusations against the Republican Party, racist rhetoric in the media and culture to oppress us and lay claim on our votes. | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=a1cdfcb8784341718484f22945d09cf6&_e=3xkOTo9ONYv1tWqMnT1HA4yXdAaq0oimXofl2c9wQOwWlKcBSIJMvj8PVczsxbP4ExkBp3gnXwPIufCoRf9bYbfE8JZVQsHeATcXCAhrzutXn-W2N1UvahMIaZTcqNh1sY-B1r6bvghcvhhsj8b6p1hkFDJdA9OAfOIXeLhm4UT-SjDHlsUq9q1dhaAzCUPr1s8xnVZStXBkByysfLgovUA2aYh3iTmEyqF2rChK-qZuFqshhub-b6AKW7NdG1x4mpAMwfN3EM_zeY350n4B_yVHz2PEsjcI1q82qWZTewy7lz1LCadHurTbKaThDu_o4NjN7BTk4R4H88GQTCqT8awyU_pgJhQ1jDJVEBcg2gC9zFtLp200NEhOqdZxnrAmaW8B84BOpAbI6F68tubwAdH_9A6RoeluJt-Ab5ydwWrwJQZktIUcFGREq1Da2NUBHPux4XSRto4_LwCs521oEQ%3D%3D)

Peter,

I knew that when I decided to run for public office, I would have my life scrutinized and that personal attacks come with the territory.

I have spent my life fighting tough battles. As veteran of Operation Enduring Freedom and a small business owner, I have learned how to face tough situations and persevere. I thought I was ready for anything.

**However, I have to admit, I was not ready for the insults and racial attacks that have been hurled at me from the left, mostly for the same reason.**

[**As a black female, I dared to have my own views, I defy what is expected of me from the Democrat party and step out of line to express my conservative values.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=a1cdfcb8784341718484f22945d09cf6&_e=3xkOTo9ONYv1tWqMnT1HA4yXdAaq0oimXofl2c9wQOwWlKcBSIJMvj8PVczsxbP4ExkBp3gnXwPIufCoRf9bYbfE8JZVQsHeATcXCAhrzutXn-W2N1UvahMIaZTcqNh1sY-B1r6bvghcvhhsj8b6p1hkFDJdA9OAfOIXeLhm4UT-SjDHlsUq9q1dhaAzCUPr1s8xnVZStXBkByysfLgovUA2aYh3iTmEyqF2rChK-qYQ4WcZ1wXUxjZ0fWmPITBeAVONs742wHjtVdW6v-W9wHxUqm7IbaMhVLc8FmfLHQAVGtHKtGw99EgotWuwKLFNvaYLc6LgYzGUEiEwLIogOzt82Lrzx0A8i-SglqCQcF0LyBW_FAgtmV5AEj647REa0R5djn0Up0ui8Rn1Z6NcHpyYazYQ3tsAs9BvgJyyJ9whobjsZi1XsOma3URhur1akL8_6zMcngh9MINO26jreA%3D%3D)

[**Send A Black Conservative Female to Congress ✈ **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=a1cdfcb8784341718484f22945d09cf6&_e=3xkOTo9ONYv1tWqMnT1HA4yXdAaq0oimXofl2c9wQOwWlKcBSIJMvj8PVczsxbP4ExkBp3gnXwPIufCoRf9bYbfE8JZVQsHeATcXCAhrzutXn-W2N1UvahMIaZTcqNh1sY-B1r6bvghcvhhsj8b6p1hkFDJdA9OAfOIXeLhm4UT-SjDHlsUq9q1dhaAzCUPr1s8xnVZStXBkByysfLgovUA2aYh3iTmEyqF2rChK-qaJnZC1qHCl4Iod60RHa0Uzqd1F6rRtxhoc3hlcbx5qHGWKFHZkK6Q8avg2jum83NWppJyaizYYrq5MaqLwoxDfv4mU5wLluv-QoftULZ5hbQnO7beTFxyIbHZ7lmWnhllL6n_Qtb3sehYU-qSYNQZmowntADfANtJ9PqPXlUumUWjxjdqzM9fQUGzJ4eqgaRH592d_0IVcRobBYm8kaM-0nzLnUxW6jqQ62KJZ83ypoQ%3D%3D)
Here as just some of the comments I have received:
***Warning - Graphic Language***
_
* "Coon"
* "Half Breed" (which I am not.. both my parents are black)
* "Auntie Tom, Uncle Tom"
* "House N*****r"
* "Sellout"
* "High Yellow Girl"
_
[**Send A Black Conservative Female to Congress ✈ **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=a1cdfcb8784341718484f22945d09cf6&_e=3xkOTo9ONYv1tWqMnT1HA4yXdAaq0oimXofl2c9wQOwWlKcBSIJMvj8PVczsxbP4ExkBp3gnXwPIufCoRf9bYbfE8JZVQsHeATcXCAhrzutXn-W2N1UvahMIaZTcqNh1sY-B1r6bvghcvhhsj8b6p1hkFDJdA9OAfOIXeLhm4UT-SjDHlsUq9q1dhaAzCUPr1s8xnVZStXBkByysfLgovUA2aYh3iTmEyqF2rChK-qZyQWvAX0nyGTE6JV_nw7xUNm9FBWCgzygsj9BOwovKuQG2ZczyGw1n4BkYzUeDczEOWGnTA_GdTBPpPCNWM4E1pJd8nGoGNexaP2vqSQhCCoX_o6PBHRoI9sRdH2QtefEv39OSIJDB_nzjeUy9TsY8Y_VN-poA0bNAdIs2APwlC_IJZILku09L0eEFtAuvsWpwXyaLLBG1IZfxp1QBWkpCDbj2lXpy7lOINCM5_5U4MA%3D%3D)
I am a strong conservative woman and these comments cannot harm me. What concerns me is that there are people out there that think these attacks are okay because I dare to be a conservative...**That my ethnicity should dictate my political party and that black females are not allowed to step out of line and think for themselves.**

➔ It's no wonder that Democrats have been able to get away with promoting an education system that consistently fails black children for the benefit of the special interests that fund their campaigns.

➔ It is no wonder that the Democrats have been able to look the other way as the majority of babies aborted are babies of color.

➔ It is no wonder that the Democrats are able to call President Trump a racist, even as he passed historic legislation reducing prison sentences for thousands of non-violent offenders of color.

[**I am proud to think for myself and I am proud to be a Republican.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=a1cdfcb8784341718484f22945d09cf6&_e=3xkOTo9ONYv1tWqMnT1HA4yXdAaq0oimXofl2c9wQOwWlKcBSIJMvj8PVczsxbP4ExkBp3gnXwPIufCoRf9bYbfE8JZVQsHeATcXCAhrzutXn-W2N1UvahMIaZTcqNh1sY-B1r6bvghcvhhsj8b6p1hkFDJdA9OAfOIXeLhm4UT-SjDHlsUq9q1dhaAzCUPr1s8xnVZStXBkByysfLgovUA2aYh3iTmEyqF2rChK-qa7T_29NHAFf12KXZ1pQnBawYZKyXI2663x7IpwzT9fDUGCrHmU70DxsXCgZe-F4_LL02nlxN3NIEgEP-zU7r55J5EBO3O2Tt5wM2Nhk8wvOQ_gfFMdBpx4cfy5kBURn37TDdBQCcbiUBZdQAZzqCoq_RcBc8qDmAGu_GbLQ7iJDcjOSvnvQrOqL1R1gDYC7SJ2NIMk0LAvzT_Ytrrv7TMBW3KYWAVtT_AzYzKHdi8bLg%3D%3D)

[**Send A Black Conservative Female to Congress ✈ **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=a1cdfcb8784341718484f22945d09cf6&_e=3xkOTo9ONYv1tWqMnT1HA4yXdAaq0oimXofl2c9wQOwWlKcBSIJMvj8PVczsxbP4ExkBp3gnXwPIufCoRf9bYbfE8JZVQsHeATcXCAhrzutXn-W2N1UvahMIaZTcqNh1sY-B1r6bvghcvhhsj8b6p1hkFDJdA9OAfOIXeLhm4UT-SjDHlsUq9q1dhaAzCUPr1s8xnVZStXBkByysfLgovUA2aYh3iTmEyqF2rChK-qad8hIS7mz9cO_EP3e1wtyTfOrlaideC0lIFKHxOU20wqNDxmkSkRx1CWL3JDfMgYj-nRclqG8nqklK3SrckZ-BeLypYxowr02BQSw2GNjh0wCql9uoYvhoEsV5AEIDutllvGvBoEKFikZyHlsucqI0Ho82uUErV2D2h3kWpHAXZ1FL3JT3HGtRs3usRYejC8N1Zgez3PZ9Ivz-_YtmUzxa5yUO7DD6DNEieYH0Wg2Slg%3D%3D)
Every American was born with the God-given right of freedom of thought. I will not tolerate the hateful attacks from the left, simply because I dared to tell them I will not look the other way.

[**I am asking you to stand with me today and put an end to hate the left spews everyday.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=a1cdfcb8784341718484f22945d09cf6&_e=3xkOTo9ONYv1tWqMnT1HA4yXdAaq0oimXofl2c9wQOwWlKcBSIJMvj8PVczsxbP4ExkBp3gnXwPIufCoRf9bYbfE8JZVQsHeATcXCAhrzutXn-W2N1UvahMIaZTcqNh1sY-B1r6bvghcvhhsj8b6p1hkFDJdA9OAfOIXeLhm4UT-SjDHlsUq9q1dhaAzCUPr1s8xnVZStXBkByysfLgovUA2aYh3iTmEyqF2rChK-qZtfK6Cfvk25m9anNAjrQ73N71PeD4yNV346oln_wxbB6tJ0bYq10dMxec32gD1j0mBg_Fgsw_uFg0rCeSl1BYsMVPvhLUxUXaeRrB-I8Kh0GLpmGnjOvIawR-yYLsDQIL4iyTqodAEUwO2Mmw0quYq0p4OfGLEnFCvijloA4Io_B2726TcZ7XwxRBS_gVYp4IoKY7kfxVE3vHpRko0aRmN-Cb6KaKlsw1voe3vbDPQLw%3D%3D)

Thank you,

Aja Smith
United States Air Force Veteran
Republican for Congress

name: Rick Larsen
subject: The communities and people helped by our Rescue Plan
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32716826/296643906/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNGM0YTExZS1hY2U5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XhMijlHIM4hRL8F8njQKxDsj1UjF2tIOfvcmBcLaCsc=&emci=fcb769a2-a4e9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=d4c4a11e-ace9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=9494239)
---

| | Last year, we organized, mobilized and voted in record numbers. We did this, in part, because we needed real leadership and solutions to address the pandemic. The American Rescue Plan is one of the major successes of our historic turnout in the last election. Because of the change in leadership real relief has been delivered to our families, small businesses, schools and local communities who suffered through the inaction of the last administration. **When we talk about the American Rescue Plan we have to be very clear that it is more than just another budget line item. It is a massive investment in critical support for Northwest Washington communities feeling the pain from a historic pandemic.** Not all of my colleagues in Congress supported this critical investment. Some Republican politicians, the same ones who voted to give the ultra-wealthy massive tax cuts during the Trump years, did not support our plan because it was too big, too bold. This lifeline legislation is making a critical difference in our communities: Families across the country — including 133,000 children in Northwest Washington — are now receiving advance payments from the expanded child tax credit, helping with child care and other costs. Our schools are receiving funds so they can safely re-open this fall — $1.8 billion just in Washington state, the equivalent of about $1600 per student. The American Rescue Plan includes funds to support housing for 2,443 families at the greatest risk of homelessness, right here in Washington. And, of course, it continues the historic investment in COVID-19 testing, tracing, and vaccinations — with nearly $2 billion in funding in Washington alone so far. The COVID-19 pandemic, and the economic and social challenges we faced in its wake, were worsened by a haphazard and far-too-slow response from the Trump administration. **The**** _people_****organized, mobilized, and voted for change, and that is exactly what our American Rescue Plan is — a lifeline for each family, neighborhood, and community in Northwest Washington and beyond.** That is why we work hard. clean_body: | | | Last year, we organized, mobilized and voted in record numbers. We did this, in part, because we needed real leadership and solutions to address the pandemic. The American Rescue Plan is one of the major successes of our historic turnout in the last election. Because of the change in leadership real relief has been delivered to our families, small businesses, schools and local communities who suffered through the inaction of the last administration. When we talk about the American Rescue Plan we have to be very clear that it is more than just another budget line item. It is a massive investment in critical support for Northwest Washington communities feeling the pain from a historic pandemic. Not all of my colleagues in Congress supported this critical investment. Some Republican politicians, the same ones who voted to give the ultra-wealthy massive tax cuts during the Trump years, did not support our plan because it was too big, too bold. This lifeline legislation is making a critical difference in our communities: Families across the country — including 133,000 children in Northwest Washington — are now receiving advance payments from the expanded child tax credit, helping with child care and other costs. Our schools are receiving funds so they can safely re-open this fall — $1.8 billion just in Washington state, the equivalent of about $1600 per student. The American Rescue Plan includes funds to support housing for 2,443 families at the greatest risk of homelessness, right here in Washington. And, of course, it continues the historic investment in COVID-19 testing, tracing, and vaccinations — with nearly $2 billion in funding in Washington alone so far. The COVID-19 pandemic, and the economic and social challenges we faced in its wake, were worsened by a haphazard and far-too-slow response from the Trump administration. The peopleorganized, mobilized, and voted for change, and that is exactly what our American Rescue Plan is — a lifeline for each family, neighborhood, and community in Northwest Washington and beyond. That is why we work hard. This is why we fight. As a community member, running for office was never part of my plan.

My hard-working immigrant parents taught me from a young age to fight for my beliefs and give back to my community.

**With everything I’ve seen, I simply couldn’t turn my back on my community when they needed help.**

From the Affordable Care Act to the Child Tax Credit, I’m proud to say House Democratic work in Congress is helping the middle-class bounce back from this pandemic.

And I mean this when I say it: _This movement would be impossible without your support, Peter._

**But I’ll be blunt now: If Democrats don’t hold onto the House in 2022, it’s going to be impossible to get anything else done for the working class.**

And as Republicans work to undermine President Biden’s legislative agenda and undo all of the progress we’ve paved so far, I need your support again.

[**Will you chip in $3 to defend our House Democratic majority, Peter? We need 250 donations by midnight, and your money will go a long way towards bolstering our legislative agenda »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32717376/296645896/1032035308?amount=3&refcode=TCFC_20210720_EMDF_E1_T0_ND_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTE2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiN2ViNWUzYi1hZWU5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FXLWnh9hA0N5UM8Cb1CeHyMQUMDTh9Uvom8wmUeb7EQ=)

clean_body: I believe there’s so much more to be done. | = Peter, = | = As a community member, running for office was never part of my plan. My hard-working immigrant parents taught me from a young age to fight for my beliefs and give back to my community. With everything I’ve seen, I simply couldn’t turn my back on my community when they needed help. From the Affordable Care Act to the Child Tax Credit, I’m proud to say House Democratic work in Congress is helping the middle-class bounce back from this pandemic. And I mean this when I say it: This movement would be impossible without your support, Peter. But I’ll be blunt now: If Democrats don’t hold onto the House in 2022, it’s going to be impossible to get anything else done for the working class. And as Republicans work to undermine President Biden’s legislative agenda and undo all of the progress we’ve paved so far, I need your support again. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = Thank you, \-- Tony | | Paid for by Tony Cárdenas For Congress P.O. name: Walt Blackman | Combat Veteran
subject: I don’t even recognize America anymore
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Walt Blackman for Congress |
body:
| |
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57978029:Jgi_GnlNZ:m:1:3253819041:190725FFB93F41679274B04D132BC348:r)
|
---
Hi there Peter, I'm Walt Blackman, I'm a combat veteran, a conservative patriot, and I can't believe what's happening in our country right now.

⬇⬇⬇

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57978029:Jgi_GnlNZ:m:1:3253819041:190725FFB93F41679274B04D132BC348:r)

_**✖** Joe Biden said they would go "door-to-door"..._
_**✖** Health Secretary Becerra said, "it's absolutely the government's business"..._
_**✖** The media is calling for people to be vaccinated or lose their jobs. _

To be clear Peter, this fight isn't about whether an individual chooses to get vaccinated or not.

**It 's about the federal government overstepping its authority and invading the health privacy of MILLIONS of Americans.**
[**Send Walt to Congress to Fight For You**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57978029:Jgi_GnlNZ:m:1:3253819041:190725FFB93F41679274B04D132BC348:r)
I tell you somedays I don't even recognize this country anymore. _**I bet you don 't either**._

Our freedoms are being ripped away. Our country sold out to our enemies. And our leaders are completely unaccountable.

That's why I'm reaching out, Peter. America is in peril, and there's no one coming to save it.

It's up to proud patriots and Americans like me and you to stand up and win our country back from the radical Left.

_**[Peter, I 'm calling on you right now to rush $5, $10, or whatever you can to help me save America and safeguard our freedomsーwill you answer the call?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57978029:Jgi_GnlNZ:m:1:3253819041:190725FFB93F41679274B04D132BC348:r)**_****
_Want to hear the rest of my story?_

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57978029:Jgi_GnlNZ:m:1:3253819041:190725FFB93F41679274B04D132BC348:r)

I served in the United States Army for nearly 22 years as a Front Line Tank Commander. I completed 7 tours of duty in some of the world's most dangerous battlefields, including Kosovo, Afghanistan, and Iraq, where I fought in the Second Battle of Fallujah, the bloodiest battle in the Iraq War.
My service earned me a Bronze Star for combat action in Iraq and a Meritorious Service Medal. But the most important thing I learned from my service was **the true price of Freedom and how fragile it is.**
You know Freedom means something a little different to veterans, warfighters, and combat vets.

We look at it a bit differently. When we see that flag, something burns deep inside--that burning we have is for a desire to preserve Freedom for everyone regardless of background.
** **
_**We believe in Freedom.**_
** **
**We don 't believe in burning down monuments...**
** **
**We don 't believe in burning our flag...**
** **
**We stand up for our flag! **
** **
**And we stand up for the United States of America!**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57978029:Jgi_GnlNZ:m:1:3253819041:190725FFB93F41679274B04D132BC348:r)

I'm running for Congress because I know the true price of Freedom, and I know what's at stake if we lose it.

**I 've served my country faithfully for 22 years; I hope you help me continue that service in Congress! **

**If you want to join me in my fight for Freedom, you can chip in at this secure link:****_[https://secure.winred.com/walt-blackman-for-congress/action-2607957/](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57978029:Jgi_GnlNZ:m:1:3253819041:190725FFB93F41679274B04D132BC348:r)_**

Thank you,
Walt Blackman
[**Support My Fight for Freedom**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57978029:Jgi_GnlNZ:m:1:3253819041:190725FFB93F41679274B04D132BC348:r)
---
Pictures taken in uniform while Walt was in active service does not imply DOD or military endorsement.
---

Republicans only need to win a handful of seats to wrest back control of Congress from free-spending Democrats like my opponent, and the path to victory runs right through Oregon 4. We’re going to be playing catch up for the rest of the month, and I sincerely need your help.

Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of Homeland Security or the Department of Defense. | Paid For By Alek For Oregon Don't want to receive any more of our emails?
