body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32717853/296647131/902632477?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmU3YTIwYS1iMGU5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xMF-gLH8JmX7YhM_1Cd7kzK4L9isj8tfM86rfynA0As=&emci=51f306d9-b4e8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=5fe7a20a-b0e9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15053672) | Two weeks ago yesterday, Sen. Sharif Street found himself the public voice of a family devastated by gun violence. It was not the first time his family had lost a loved one this way. The Street family shared their despair and anguish with dozens of other families whose loved ones were killed or injured during the eruption of gun violence across the country over the July 4th weekend. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32717854/296647132/-803081404?refcode=E10247-20210719-VotingGunSafety-graphic-GunViolence-RegTemplate-VotingRightsElections-NA&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmU3YTIwYS1iMGU5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xMF-gLH8JmX7YhM_1Cd7kzK4L9isj8tfM86rfynA0As=) One week ago, Sen. Street welcomed long-time family friend, President Joe Biden, to Philadelphia, where the President passionately denounced the war on democracy and voting rights being waged by Republicans at the national and state level. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32717855/296647134/-803081404?refcode=E10247-20210719-VotingGunSafety-graphic-GunViolence-RegTemplate-VotingRightsElections-NA&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmU3YTIwYS1iMGU5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xMF-gLH8JmX7YhM_1Cd7kzK4L9isj8tfM86rfynA0As=) Sharif and Presdient Biden have worked together for many years, but the president's visit should not have been necessary. Sharif shares the frustration and outrage of Pennsylvanians, Texans, Arizonians and all Americans, that in 2021, the president of the United States had to travel to Philadelphia--the birthplace of American Democracy--to _remind_ Republicans that America _is a democracy_ , that all _Americans have the right to vote._ **_We need_** passage of the federal John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act because the residents of states like Pennsylvania can’t live with their democracy under constant threat from state lawmakers more loyal to Donald Trump than they are to the people they are sworn to represent. **_We need_** national gun safety legislation because, as Sen. Street said in mourning his lost relative, it’s not going to happen at the state level in states like Pennsylvania. [**We need to elect Sharif Street the next U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32717856/296647136/-803081404?refcode=E10247-20210719-VotingGunSafety-SL-GunViolence-RegTemplate-VotingRightsElections-NA&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmU3YTIwYS1iMGU5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xMF-gLH8JmX7YhM_1Cd7kzK4L9isj8tfM86rfynA0As=) Sharif will not only help empower the Senate, and President Biden, to enact policies that will protect the lives and rights of all Americans, but has a proven track record of finding common ground and working across the aisle to get things done. **[We must protect the progress made by the people of Pennsylvania. Chip in today to ensure that Sharif's progressive and inclusive vision is a possibility for all of PA.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32717857/296647137/-803081404?refcode=E10247-20210719-VotingGunSafety-SL-GunViolence-RegTemplate-VotingRightsElections-NA&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmU3YTIwYS1iMGU5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xMF-gLH8JmX7YhM_1Cd7kzK4L9isj8tfM86rfynA0As=)** Speeches and soundbytes don’t matter if you can’t get anything done. When you take “progress” out of “progressive,” you’re left with “I’ve.” Sharif Street has a **_record of progress_** because he knows how to say “we’ve.” Thank you for being a tireless advocate for progress. \-- Team Street
---
* * *
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32717858/296647138/739965875?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmU3YTIwYS1iMGU5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xMF-gLH8JmX7YhM_1Cd7kzK4L9isj8tfM86rfynA0As=&emci=51f306d9-b4e8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=5fe7a20a-b0e9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15053672)[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32717859/296647139/679741736?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmU3YTIwYS1iMGU5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xMF-gLH8JmX7YhM_1Cd7kzK4L9isj8tfM86rfynA0As=&emci=51f306d9-b4e8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=5fe7a20a-b0e9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15053672)[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32717860/296647140/454387298?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmU3YTIwYS1iMGU5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xMF-gLH8JmX7YhM_1Cd7kzK4L9isj8tfM86rfynA0As=&emci=51f306d9-b4e8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=5fe7a20a-b0e9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15053672)

clean_body: | | Two weeks ago yesterday, Sen. Sharif Street found himself the public voice of a family devastated by gun violence. It was not the first time his family had lost a loved one this way. The Street family shared their despair and anguish with dozens of other families whose loved ones were killed or injured during the eruption of gun violence across the country over the July 4th weekend. = One week ago, Sen. Street welcomed long-time family friend, President Joe Biden, to Philadelphia, where the President passionately denounced the war on democracy and voting rights being waged by Republicans at the national and state level. = Sharif and Presdient Biden have worked together for many years, but the president's visit should not have been necessary. Sharif shares the frustration and outrage of Pennsylvanians, Texans, Arizonians and all Americans, that in 2021, the president of the United States had to travel to Philadelphia--the birthplace of American Democracy--to remind Republicans that America is a democracy , that all Americans have the right to vote. We need passage of the federal John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act because the residents of states like Pennsylvania can’t live with their democracy under constant threat from state lawmakers more loyal to Donald Trump than they are to the people they are sworn to represent. We need national gun safety legislation because, as Sen. Street said in mourning his lost relative, it’s not going to happen at the state level in states like Pennsylvania. = Sharif will not only help empower the Senate, and President Biden, to enact policies that will protect the lives and rights of all Americans, but has a proven track record of finding common ground and working across the aisle to get things done. = Speeches and soundbytes don’t matter if you can’t get anything done. When you take “progress” out of “progressive,” you’re left with “I’ve.” Sharif Street has a record of progress because he knows how to say “we’ve.” Thank you for being a tireless advocate for progress. \-- Team Street Senator Sharif Street has assembled an Exploratory Committee comprised of over 100 leaders from across the Commonwealth representing a diversity of experiences to help him develop a winning policy agenda that'll flip Pennsylvania's Senate seat from red-to-blue! **, but if you'd like to receive fewer emails, we understand. | Fellow Patriot, This morning, I officially announced my candidacy for the Republican nomination in Florida's 13th District!

We had a fantastic kickoff event with tremendous speakers and an enthusiastic crowd of supporters who are ready to flip this district and RETIRE Nancy Pelosi!
---
|
---
| In Congress, I'll stand strong for my PROVEN conservative values and work to reinstate President Trump's border security policies, rein in the out-of-control spending, support our Veterans, ensure our elections are secure, and keep radical leftist propaganda out of our schools.

**It's going to take all of us to win this race and play a major role in flipping control of the U.S. House back to Republicans.**

[Can I count on you to join this effort by chipping in $50, $25 or $10 to help us start this race strong?](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=250c1e1082&e=c2296cffff)

God bless, and I'll see you on the trail!

Amanda

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: Early Audit Result Info
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Important |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=d4d35e6544&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear , Buckle your seatbelts- this is it, and the results are coming in from America’s Audit in Maricopa County in Arizona.
**My name is Mark Finchem. I’m the first guy who took a stand and said NO; I listened to you when so many others could not be bothered. I led a team of courageous legislators who joined me in the very first hearing that launched a nationwide phenomenon.**
*****JOIN THE MOVEMENT*****
As a state Representative who has been leading the charge for the Maricopa Audit from the beginning, it is my mission to make sure that every state has their election’s audited to see what REALLY happened in the 2020 election- and [I need your help](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=17884fbbd5&e=44b8c466b0)! And Georgia’s next...
---
|
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=8323d6d29e&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| _Election integrity is the single most important thing to me. That is why I am running for Secretary of State in Arizona, to make sure that our elections are protected from the Democrats!_

**I have been writing you every week, telling you just to be patient, waiting for the reports to come out.**

Well....the time is up. The reports are starting to come out, and the results ain’t pretty.

**Don’t worry, there’s a lot more to come, but I want to get you started with three of the most important stories to watch...**

**__One...__**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=c4cb1d38b7&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **After review, we know that there are 168,000 on demand ballots that are suspect. This makes it IMPOSSIBLE to call the election accurately, which means that Arizona should not have been declared for Biden – as we knew all along.**

The next step is simple. Audit the votes by canvassing – make sure these people actually exist! As a former criminal investigator, if I learned anything its this: Follow the evidence!

**__Two...__**
---
|
---
| I might not be a mathematician, but something doesn’t add up. 74,000 more ballots received than the ballots sent out! We need to examine and audit the USPS to find the root of this fraud.

**When you have more ballots mailed out than were asked for, and even MORE sent back, this is clearly a monumental problem.**

_Through our hard work and your support, we are literally catching the Democrats RED HANDED as we speak._

**And the fight is just beginning! We must win our bid for Secretary of State to make sure that Arizona elections are safe!**

[_Donate as much as you can to FINISH the fight, defend our elections, and help my campaign to win Secretary of State. Every dollar you donate goes to helping spread this message of Election integrity!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=2e5aa42c27&e=44b8c466b0)

**__Three...__**
---
|
---
| **How is it possible in “The most free and fair election of all time” that there were thousands of names added as voters after election day? **

_It’s simple. It’s not possible. The Democrats have been lying to America through the puppet of the Fake News Media!_

**And we have to stop them now. There is no choice. The Audit is under attack, and with that – if they succeed – the last hopes of stopping the Biden presidency and protecting our elections goes up in smoke.**

A big donation today sends a bigger message that you can’t mess with American freedoms and you can’t mess with American elections. We need to protect the integrity of the audit, of our elections, and of the freest nation on earth!

[**Can you help me?**

_Donate TODAY to send a message to the Democrats that we won’t back down!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=ff11036950&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=aa9282d0d2&e=44b8c466b0)

God Bless You,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=b520ba0814&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2021 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737
[Add us to your address book](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=99333a2f15) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=99333a2f15).

Two... | | I might not be a mathematician, but something doesn’t add up. 74,000 more ballots received than the ballots sent out! We need to examine and audit the USPS to find the root of this fraud. When you have more ballots mailed out than were asked for, and even MORE sent back, this is clearly a monumental problem. Through our hard work and your support, we are literally catching the Democrats RED HANDED as we speak. And the fight is just beginning! We must win our bid for Secretary of State to make sure that Arizona elections are safe! Three... | | How is it possible in “The most free and fair election of all time” that there were thousands of names added as voters after election day? It’s simple. It’s not possible. The Democrats have been lying to America through the puppet of the Fake News Media! And we have to stop them now. There is no choice. The Audit is under attack, and with that – if they succeed – the last hopes of stopping the Biden presidency and protecting our elections goes up in smoke. A big donation today sends a bigger message that you can’t mess with American freedoms and you can’t mess with American elections. We need to protect the integrity of the audit, of our elections, and of the freest nation on earth! | God Bless You, | | Mark Finchem Arizona House of Representatives – District 11 Republican for Arizona Secretary of State Conservative Election Integrity Patriot PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE | | | Copyright © 2021 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved. subject: Dr. Fauci lied to our faces Peter

body:
**It 's time for Dr. Fauci to find another job.** **[Chip in if you agree!>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57979190:6dCrwnlNz:m:1:3253819041:2528E1CA053A768B5E23766D649A592B:r)** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57979190:6dCrwnlNz:m:1:3253819041:2528E1CA053A768B5E23766D649A592B:r) | |
---
Peter,

On May 11th, Dr. Fauci lied to our faces.

He came to the Senate and told us that the NIH absolutely did not fund gain of function research.

That simply isn't true and I gave Dr. Fauci the chance to retract his statements in our Senate hearing today.

No surprise, he stood by his lies.
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57979190:6dCrwnlNz:m:1:3253819041:2528E1CA053A768B5E23766D649A592B:r)
[**WATCH NOW >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57979190:6dCrwnlNz:m:1:3253819041:2528E1CA053A768B5E23766D649A592B:r)
It's never been more clear that Dr. Fauci believes he's invincible. He believes our strong bureaucracy and his corrupt allies in Congress will defend him till the end. He thinks he can avoid accountability completely.

_I'm doing everything to prove him wrong. _

I'm leading the charge to #FIREFAUCI and hold him accountable for lying to Congress, misleading the public, and for his well-documented role in providing funds to the Wuhan Lab in China so they can create bioweapons like COVID-19.

Will you join my fight by chipping in now?

**By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution:**
[**STAND WITH RAND: $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57979191:6dCrwnlNz:m:1:3253819041:2528E1CA053A768B5E23766D649A592B:r)
[**STAND WITH RAND: $15**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57979192:6dCrwnlNz:m:1:3253819041:2528E1CA053A768B5E23766D649A592B:r)
[**STAND WITH RAND: $10**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57979193:6dCrwnlNz:m:1:3253819041:2528E1CA053A768B5E23766D649A592B:r)
[**STAND WITH RAND: $5**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57979194:6dCrwnlNz:m:1:3253819041:2528E1CA053A768B5E23766D649A592B:r)
**If you've saved payment information with WinRed, your donation will go through automatically.**

Dr. Fauci has proven time and time again that he has no idea what he's doing.

He's not an expert in COVID. He's an expert in political theater!

You can see that every time he's in front of the microphone.

* He still says he doesn't know the role China played in the pandemic.
* He denies he supported gain of function research despite the paper trail that _proves he did._
* He claims to "trusts the science" but repeatedly denies it in favor of theatrics and dramatic attacks.

He dances around it, but we know the truth. We've seen the documents. We've read the emails. We've watched the COVID hysteria unfold over the past 18 months.

Not only was he flat-out wrong about the virus, but he's also continuously lied to the American public and demonstrated poor judgment.

ENOUGH IS ENOUGH. It's time for Fauci TO GO.

**That's why I'm putting my foot down and if you agree I hope you'll chip in now:[https://secure.winred.com/randpaul/action-2615210-raf/ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57979190:6dCrwnlNz:m:1:3253819041:2528E1CA053A768B5E23766D649A592B:r)**

I have been fighting to dismiss Fauci for a while now, but I know more than ever I can't do it alone.

I need to show strength and support against the Fauci-loving bureaucracy. **[Would you please chip in $100, $50, $25, or $10 to help out?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57979190:6dCrwnlNz:m:1:3253819041:2528E1CA053A768B5E23766D649A592B:r)

**
In Liberty,
Rand Paul

Peter, there’s no doubt about it: the radical left has welcomed in a new era of pro-abortion rhetoric that is reaching new lows.

Just recently in Arkansas, an extremist group hung a 44-foot banner that read "GOD BLESS ABORTIONS" on a monument of Jesus Christ.

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=3698321406a245c195c6c14e5b125a10&_e=mA4gUxjj1pVSibMyYUTalSY8lyrqYssV90XwlL7Fvu3fk8A87hUmuignm4-O7VI1nkz1-5kBvzlWkSHbZ5XPc9MyiO9qfJwKk1SCjDsUkhlAGCyQxn0-55KlleHhjIPa54WojqMrtLoVDUGyObpqZsEczMJyOvL3-HtSPENJUns7wm8W6HdvGmsFVe72iXA_gcUuX4ym_YMObaXSAtw8UrujGP3Qjm98_DEJdMH9XbyKAq10Hz9sM7z1L_spks0WtO-s2kORVRXZQE6LAqmwaoFZATD1zc39nCgb_qhMPoZSAEW54lk87e4h87Vxi32r7-nlVwCVQbeXRYsbKd8Z7s_vb-LZid8PRzwLqmrOvenP_CzcLKhzv1WYjXBELrTEyIdv5bOEgCkMnEDMmGydwZ2SP1-Mmsy6uPGD79qkKQr3ZQMZIIUUO4uydf4y8L92orJO6_n5nuUH9C0fGatt62UL1-cjjt3Hspgeh2S-KyEi4XzyhZqwaT2omG39Nub8XT1PHGeJgk6dk5DGWnfsxA%3D%3D)
Peter,

The Democrats spent four years trying to stop President Trump from getting anything accomplished for the American people. Now, President Biden is replicating the leadership style of Barack Obama: governing by executive order and strong-arming legislation through the House and Senate, in spite of having the narrowest majorities in DECADES.

**So much for working with Republicans in Congress.**

If we don't start building our coalition now, all bets are off for winning back control of Congress next year. And honestly, America cannot afford two additional years of total Democrat control.

I’m writing today because we must start now to win a Conservative majority in Congress. **[We only need to win a handful of seats to return a conservative majority in Congress](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=3698321406a245c195c6c14e5b125a10&_e=mA4gUxjj1pVSibMyYUTalSY8lyrqYssV90XwlL7Fvu3fk8A87hUmuignm4-O7VI1nkz1-5kBvzlWkSHbZ5XPc9MyiO9qfJwKk1SCjDsUkhlAGCyQxn0-55KlleHhjIPa54WojqMrtLoVDUGyObpqZsEczMJyOvL3-HtSPENJUns7wm8W6HdvGmsFVe72iXA_gcUuX4ym_YMObaXSAtw8UrujGP3Qjm98_DEJdMH9XbyKAq10Hz9sM7z1L_spks0WtO-s2kORVRXZQE6LAqmwaoFZATD1zc39nCgb_qhMPoZSAEW54lk87e4h87Vxi32rPvwSpJinX1GujIAX48UGAX62PkEqn5iLa_25FXmW3gG0zYYTdCSchRmO1mN68htpOq2BsLfsvvcw2nDW9xdx-opQiYVmv8tAjgcZwUipwhmYP66ej5095qqvmYrxz8Vzj8KByG4o-gxgZyapuJtZMylaq59kNg0N4A5w2AxeQWHH1WmV5qv8k6At_plfN4FkoOvgAv14rFvc4ZHR_EVXvQ%3D%3D)**.

While the election may not be this month or even this year – **it’s imperative we’re able to begin the groundwork for a successful campaign cycle. TODAY.**

That's why before the end of July, **I’ve set a goal of identifying[100,000 conservatives](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=3698321406a245c195c6c14e5b125a10&_e=mA4gUxjj1pVSibMyYUTalSY8lyrqYssV90XwlL7Fvu3fk8A87hUmuignm4-O7VI1nkz1-5kBvzlWkSHbZ5XPc9MyiO9qfJwKk1SCjDsUkhlAGCyQxn0-55KlleHhjIPa54WojqMrtLoVDUGyObpqZsEczMJyOvL3-HtSPENJUns7wm8W6HdvGmsFVe72iXA_gcUuX4ym_YMObaXSAtw8UrujGP3Qjm98_DEJdMH9XbyKAq10Hz9sM7z1L_spks0WtO-s2kORVRXZQE6LAqmwaoFZATD1zc39nCgb_qhMPoZSAEW54lk87e4h87Vxi32rNF-pyeD-HuULea0YQ3GvU-Ya_dHlUwZkASLzd5W4-3sxSx_Vp4mdtfoZj_iMSPm0HhzhW4bNqoee9M2YZrAgcUdxNIbyvn4lIsedVjwP-2ncZW52Hqxgp-bJVYIEnsK_dvsg8HFGrHW4xxp1MUqZSL77q_zWsQykivrIc4mDcbK27mI9SDnGbtVcR3TOE3AEavSDg4psDbKQz8wGV2v5rQ%3D%3D) who stand ready and willing to help our team flip the House next November**.

**We have ELEVEN days until the end of July and so far have collected just 35,000 signatures of the 100,000 signature goal, which means today we need 5,909 conservatives to step forward in order to stay on track toward meeting our goal by July 31st **

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=3698321406a245c195c6c14e5b125a10&_e=mA4gUxjj1pVSibMyYUTalSY8lyrqYssV90XwlL7Fvu3fk8A87hUmuignm4-O7VI1nkz1-5kBvzlWkSHbZ5XPc9MyiO9qfJwKk1SCjDsUkhlAGCyQxn0-55KlleHhjIPa54WojqMrtLoVDUGyObpqZsEczMJyOvL3-HtSPENJUns7wm8W6HdvGmsFVe72iXA_gcUuX4ym_YMObaXSAtw8UrujGP3Qjm98_DEJdMH9XbyKAq10Hz9sM7z1L_spks0WtO-s2kORVRXZQE6LAqmwaoFZATD1zc39nCgb_qhMPoZSAEW54lk87e4h87Vxi32rNkEBu_CnQ4YCuHzPEopTXBanBBYS4nbPbd9exBybT8no9FwaiAfmTZnJ6jzI6zfQNAxAFdZVtoKyVC8nIiC6f-PCHgVsLgQRKv7VD7kHAQUtsijI9262cj1ubmKlnk3_6INoeAUom-BmCcmu13wHmKn8R0GS_U6eD4qTS6yfOip0aSLXLincEgeRSMPOo32GvV6RzbwX641H4vR_nSpVkQ%3D%3D)

Retiring Nancy Pelosi as Speaker and uniting all Conservatives to stop radical legislation from Joe Biden and the far left begins today. **[We’re counting on you to join our cause.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=3698321406a245c195c6c14e5b125a10&_e=mA4gUxjj1pVSibMyYUTalSY8lyrqYssV90XwlL7Fvu3fk8A87hUmuignm4-O7VI1nkz1-5kBvzlWkSHbZ5XPc9MyiO9qfJwKk1SCjDsUkhlAGCyQxn0-55KlleHhjIPa54WojqMrtLoVDUGyObpqZsEczMJyOvL3-HtSPENJUns7wm8W6HdvGmsFVe72iXA_gcUuX4ym_YMObaXSAtw8UrujGP3Qjm98_DEJdMH9XbyKAq10Hz9sM7z1L_spks0WtO-s2kORVRXZQE6LAqmwaoFZATD1zc39nCgb_qhMPoZSAEW54lk87e4h87Vxi32rfuYpx97An7n1CgrGNFWHGZUf-FNSAaoBXkKFl-lwMT-L8BEm6xaSP6QyqlV6wZJs85e_MWh-4buvviIx06oOPqZ-y0-HHWbsjEC9BircWbm9zSDtale3-UPFuMUzF-PKAh6O4qZgDx3m-7vSsXTvkruHGtaz6ylSeeNkSYbc_dWdClvAWLAGUteMIImmIUJty_Jh2av3qjcPX_CgTa4Rrg%3D%3D)**

Without control of the House or the Senate, Republicans are inherently at a disadvantage. Right now, we can’t block Democrats’ pet projects from making their way into COVID relief legislation or stop Biden from halting construction on the Keystone Pipeline.

The American people made it clear in November’s election – they elected Conservatives in nearly every close House race in the country. **[Now we must expand the map and take back the majority](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=3698321406a245c195c6c14e5b125a10&_e=mA4gUxjj1pVSibMyYUTalSY8lyrqYssV90XwlL7Fvu3fk8A87hUmuignm4-O7VI1nkz1-5kBvzlWkSHbZ5XPc9MyiO9qfJwKk1SCjDsUkhlAGCyQxn0-55KlleHhjIPa54WojqMrtLoVDUGyObpqZsEczMJyOvL3-HtSPENJUns7wm8W6HdvGmsFVe72iXA_gcUuX4ym_YMObaXSAtw8UrujGP3Qjm98_DEJdMH9XbyKAq10Hz9sM7z1L_spks0WtO-s2kORVRXZQE6LAqmwaoFZATD1zc39nCgb_qhMPoZSAEW54lk87e4h87Vxi32rYK5I_xaT9OAmqJR32QBMtAyrgK9G5WDDBsqeExteqRynfTMyNSp80PCdw9PL8JcYSPg181gkFqlHB1kgghk6hzZHk3huLgXRdTDFxIZHb4ZJPPi2C9rgcnKfcR2n6x1Udw4v5wDWAWUz1zNc3iE1Sytudw4q5K-uU_FEElijyOse5HnE7mcy2FLdQKLB5koFyo5QvDpFDYO14M6QxGvkYg%3D%3D)**.

We hope you will be among the first to sign up and signal your commitment to return a Conservative majority in the House.

Thank you for your support.

For freedom,

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=3698321406a245c195c6c14e5b125a10&_e=mA4gUxjj1pVSibMyYUTalSY8lyrqYssV90XwlL7Fvu3fk8A87hUmuignm4-O7VI1nkz1-5kBvzlWkSHbZ5XPc9MyiO9qfJwKk1SCjDsUkhlAGCyQxn0-55KlleHhjIPa54WojqMrtLoVDUGyObpqZsEczMJyOvL3-HtSPENJUns7wm8W6HdvGmsFVe72iXA_gcUuX4ym_YMObaXSAtw8UrujGP3Qjm98_DEJdMH9XbyKAq10Hz9sM7z1L_spks0WtO-s2kORVRXZQE6LAqmwaoFZATD1zc39nCgb_qhMPoZSAEW54lk87e4h87Vxi32rrZQWMSQX-oLRmZUcuNODUow6MASiwSEUGwqNLAGtPSiB7_AWpRGoHtuhSgj3mnQKxhFnMnKAnuJjcIRlTlaalGxNJjDA42dm_JeCIoi_FYTSMFfs3pEbMXSgk3_d7QgQB3aU6yJCSnGIj0zBG-bSb5e5uTaYsZEzbC_sHpapDEuF7t8qx9y0INVKkX-KBawIH9JKh_4j8EZKdNI_3ycPug%3D%3D)

And honestly, America cannot afford two additional years of total Democrat control. I’m writing today because we must start now to win a Conservative majority in Congress. . While the election may not be this month or even this year – it’s imperative we’re able to begin the groundwork for a successful campaign cycle. TODAY. That's why before the end of July, I’ve set a goal of identifying who stand ready and willing to help our team flip the House next November. We have ELEVEN days until the end of July and so far have collected just 35,000 signatures of the 100,000 signature goal, which means today we need 5,909 conservatives to step forward in order to stay on track toward meeting our goal by July 31st Retiring Nancy Pelosi as Speaker and uniting all Conservatives to stop radical legislation from Joe Biden and the far left begins today. Without control of the House or the Senate, Republicans are inherently at a disadvantage. Right now, we can’t block Democrats’ pet projects from making their way into COVID relief legislation or stop Biden from halting construction on the Keystone Pipeline. The American people made it clear in November’s election – they elected Conservatives in nearly every close House race in the country. . We hope you will be among the first to sign up and signal your commitment to return a Conservative majority in the House. Thank you for your support. For freedom, Jim Jordan | Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress PO BOX 355 Delaware, OH 43015

body:
Let's Spread the Message |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7b0dc0adfd&e=44b8c466b0)

| | Dear , **I am starting the #ProveIt campaign right now.** I am sick and tired of the liberal officials and media gaslighting us with fictitious attacks about the election - but they are doing everything they can to STOP our forensic audits and efforts to find out the truth.

We’ve already shown evidence of fraud - now it’s time for them to prove it wasn’t.

**_So I want them to #ProveIt_** \- prove that there was no fraud in the election. Prove that the machines can't access the internet. Prove that the ballots are all there. Prove that the votes weren't changed. Prove that the 3 am November 4th vote dump was legitimate. Prove that sharpies weren't given to Trump voters on election day. Prove that our elections weren't hacked. Prove it!

If you agree that the #FakeNews and the liberal officials need to PROVE IT - [you can proudly show your stance by buying one of my Prove it T-Shirts now](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=2bfbb77858&e=44b8c466b0). You will be among the first to wear one as I literally just got back from the print shop myself.

Now, when you buy one I want everyone to take a picture of themselves, their families and friends with the T-Shirt on and post it to social media. _Tag my profile and use the hashtag #ProveIt._ In your post, state what you want the left to prove since they are making wild claims about the election.

I am about to get on a plane to fly and speak to a huge audience of thousands of people and I am going to put the shirt on in front of them. They will sell out like gangbusters - so that is why I am telling you before I go up on stage. I want you to have a chance to buy the first batch.

ORDER YOURS TODAY: [https://secure.anedot.com/mark-finchem-for-secretary-of-state/proveit](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=2850967b0e&e=44b8c466b0)

God Bless You,

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: About the Billionaire space race…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Jeff Bezos made $1.6 million in the 11 minutes he was in space.
#
Peter,
Jeff Bezos just went to space for 11 minutes. His rocket launched to much fanfare. And in that 11 minutes, he made around $1.6 million.
He’s not the only billionaire blasting off either. Richard Branson and Elon Musk are two other billionaires trying to get to space while not paying their fair share in taxes.
Bezos paid less than 1% in federal taxes last year. That means many Amazon factory workers paid a higher percentage in taxes than the billionaire space explorer. It’s clear: **It’s time to pass a Wealth Tax to ensure the ultra-rich pay their fair share of taxes.** We can use that money to invest in health care, education, housing, child care, and more in BIG ways.
[**If you agree that we need to immediately pass my Wealth Tax bill, please chip in $11 right now. That’s one dollar for every minute Bezos was in space. Let’s send the ultra-rich a clear sign that we’re ready to level the playing field.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/4639?refcode=em20210720-476&t=19&akid=476%2E420207%2Ez6uz6r)
**[Contribute $11](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/4639?refcode=em20210720-476&t=20&akid=476%2E420207%2Ez6uz6r)**
$11 is nothing to Bezos, Branson, and Musk. But in our fight to transform this country so it works for working people, $11 goes a long way. That’s especially true when people like you reading this email step up and each give $11 all at once.
**[Will you chip in to this fight for a Wealth Tax today? Donate $11 and help us build our campaign for a more equitable America.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/4639?refcode=em20210720-476&t=21&akid=476%2E420207%2Ez6uz6r)**
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210720-476-footer&t=22&refcode2=476_420207_z6uz6r&akid=476%2E420207%2Ez6uz6r)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

name: Mark for Senate
subject: Re: Forced vaccinations
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark McCloskey for Missouri
body:
Do you support Biden's efforts to force vaccines on Americans who simply don't want them? Let me know. When the Fascist BLM mob marched toward my home on July 14th, 2020, it woke me up. It reminded me that our country, our freedoms that we take for granted are indeed worth FIGHTING for.

| [](http://links.mccloskeyforsenate.com/u/click?_t=1e2ca10b732d41a38216798ae8311f64&_m=df49f14d2bbf4788822a9a5b20d2f385&_e=vSTKryKVwqweQzw3R_vnNhMfnXEffuUtbFbvm75Qd9z1QgBz7goruzYGYGujc18eb_LrLcXO-U4dJg0APCcDJ_j5YPqWhwRA_OLD4EeJtrBJ1ldF9o1M2vPo45veVa042n_Xbi8tGnaH6biGZzZ-lYgjrdDoNUigrAk_k4HwsHU3Wo3wbvXVV1IydHpLSwvREfuBEtOfopua9qW6mwOl43IPyYt_lSk7Phiv6-p0t3noT5e7G1fZVmM77cjXjoXkalZLa-i0-Z3RAxM5z0AG5NP34cs3V3deA6CDH2wAnzFR92SOQYdwfojIy2LK_R2SF_iqIkDDSob_BhvnlNlqmU6Nkvoot_CsSm_ro_x21fACFwwRdLubhY1C0T8d9rmETbXnfJX54iNfGViGMb5uQ0kV-kWhB1O-o5pY9sVO1PuK2UUUrRepcaQfAth5zC6xjBxxo_yAXk2Wy16--8IHniiIeReHGmM-HjT_xDaZyWvnxzlEJheOfmwhYu_7E7awMOuIQb3kWF5x1SOL3RAy_g%3D%3D)
---

Fellow American,

This latest stunt isn’t fooling anyone.

Joe Biden and his team are going to send government sponsored advocates for the coronavirus vaccines door-to-door to get you and everyone else vaccinated.

Next thing you know,**they’re going to go door-to-door to take away guns** , to reprimand any lack of political correctness, and to address your “right wing political ideology."

If you think that sounds farfetched, just look at history. The same thing happened in Cuba, Venezuela, Russia, and so on. But, this is the land of the free because of Americans **like you** who are willing to support freedom loving patriots throughout this nation.

America was founded on the principles of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness, and we can’t let the Biden Administration trample on that with efforts like these in what he claims is the “greater good”. We know the policies of the liberal Left -- what they think is morally good and what is acceptable. body:
Can I count on your own crucial endorsement today? | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=86664f4973964723bc2ea0646f601895&_e=SMgEIADCSupBRTXDf-Sjf2VuiN9GzZ-QSyjHzYo5_V6CNZi66KEg4XmDhyPlXsJFODf0tfpjKypsr_LZtVc9q4RXgIuLiskfCqQGVVtwKmd2TnO-EbHlyVY3k5ewtfWT5QLWzukZarXJXeiikrZBHahAcm4A1uMU02OXfp7kitPoWK2gHMRUEuOBzQpv8zitlb3_GRf4HaBf-44w8emNGBIdQtDMsJzDVmOTaW75L_IsDsz8--6l2EV7f7PrRQ7NJiy84vZ5vn6AV43WvYJwnkhVsdpZFi-if9a5H1eeCppK-vU1CRHZUALB3eBiMgYDMlcGLenjfgn3uCtG0e5dy75cczpLoz5cQgyiBdkRNGPz8opb_loUi90jrR_hLEaP)

Fellow American,

It was an honor to serve with President Donald J. Trump as Secretary of the Interior, Fellow American, and now that I’m running for Congress once again, I couldn’t be prouder to have his endorsement in this critical 2022 Mid-term Election race.

As you know, Montana has been awarded a second seat in Congress, and Big Sky Republicans now have an even greater roll to play in winning right here, defeating the Biden-Harris-Pelosi Democrats, and returning the U.S. House of Representatives to GOP control.

After serving my country for decades, with more than 20 years as a U.S. Navy SEAL, a Montana state senator, Congressman, and Trump Cabinet member working to streamline and improve the Department of the Interior, I am more determined than ever to serve - and succeed - and fight to reverse the disastrous agenda of the radical Democrats.

You’ve seen it for yourself, Fellow American - in just the few short months since Joe Biden and the Democrats took control, we’ve experienced skyrocketing prices, energy shortages, more divisive identity politics, a crisis of new illegal immigration at the border, an explosion of new socialist spending on Capitol Hill, and now inflation is rearing its ugly head.

[**President Trump knows we must begin to turn things around in 2022, and his personal support is huge news for my campaign, but what I need more than anything is the rock-solid backing of grassroots conservatives like you, Fellow American.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=86664f4973964723bc2ea0646f601895&_e=SMgEIADCSupBRTXDf-Sjf2VuiN9GzZ-QSyjHzYo5_V6CNZi66KEg4XmDhyPlXsJFODf0tfpjKypsr_LZtVc9q4RXgIuLiskfCqQGVVtwKmd2TnO-EbHlyVY3k5ewtfWT5QLWzukZarXJXeiikrZBHahAcm4A1uMU02OXfp7kitOUfJBAnNmB4a_BhG3t4OCOBC1_Z9kdBOxYe5joIcs_bVyWCzuS4rnnHzaH4qFVZogkSo1nxLA9wMy5Y1CYiGIjbbLuMiKSHmoi8_1CuCvyOEKkYgkF8alQqfRWlZZJkuQMrd4XOGWh_kg90qbmkEHjvUcnkKQOay-3eyGL1Namum-HuFD2Mal-SlDHlI4omxFBUXfMZIjmCiHSxnv6zPIy)

Can I count on your own crucial endorsement today, Fellow American?

[**Please stand with me and help me prepare for a historic Montana Second Congressional District victory now with your generous contribution of $25, $50, $75, $100 or even more immediately!**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=86664f4973964723bc2ea0646f601895&_e=SMgEIADCSupBRTXDf-Sjf2VuiN9GzZ-QSyjHzYo5_V6CNZi66KEg4XmDhyPlXsJFODf0tfpjKypsr_LZtVc9q4RXgIuLiskfCqQGVVtwKmd2TnO-EbHlyVY3k5ewtfWT5QLWzukZarXJXeiikrZBHahAcm4A1uMU02OXfp7kitMUaBnfu9C7hRSsD7MgsLWYptGs5CjKfP4Yn_RyLgLS20JxQNbEqvtGEqisNSAIHDsSjfkL9E43MEXmLEECmiHpoivUkYnDwhQ957W2hQqEOkb2m8xaxXiRbsrQEWTuMFMkraCFQo68tQdopoymlvTo0t83GznLh9X-CCaRlyBdmTPhkvtr8iMBgB8YDjEGzrpkJ2h8scH8HJNbEGKnsEPe)

[**Join me, President Trump, and patriotic America First conservatives who are laying the groundwork for tremendous Republican wins to retake the U.S. House and stop the Democrats’ disastrous agenda, Fellow American - please support my campaign today!**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=86664f4973964723bc2ea0646f601895&_e=SMgEIADCSupBRTXDf-Sjf2VuiN9GzZ-QSyjHzYo5_V6CNZi66KEg4XmDhyPlXsJFODf0tfpjKypsr_LZtVc9q4RXgIuLiskfCqQGVVtwKmd2TnO-EbHlyVY3k5ewtfWT5QLWzukZarXJXeiikrZBHahAcm4A1uMU02OXfp7kitPwZiEEqrKhL5ONvF62zqW-ILW3K7YnyEAlKNfV1v1NdNhDLEPOL_ojvTkpX6lNRAcS1hun6mBaxM9uTUqN5Vn_VwScUG6uyAuRJ6KZeI29OfevD9CCG9SCcMuekeFrlC70pf-65mDGOCLmHsC85_Z2JEnyOqswrF-nxBFS5pIgGSuE-sbT1MsS0sfE60XsHnsarSepykWlmBiuKW1lpY2-)

Secretary Ryan Zinke

name: Kevin Faulconer
subject: What is Newsom afraid of?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Faulconer for Governor 2021
body:
Californians have a right to know what they’re voting for. Read more >>
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/5c3c341e03211936/a8092d1e2894b904c3d6b838967d376c/34943) Peter, There are only weeks left until Californians cast their votes, and they have a right to know who and what they are voting for. **That is why I’ve challenged Gavin Newsom to a debate..._in both English and Spanish. _** EVERY voter needs to know how we plan to turn things around in California. I’m proud of my record as the Mayor of San Diego — is Gavin Newsom proud enough of his own record to debate me? **If you want to see me on stage debating Newsom, please add your name to our petition!** [**SIGN THE PETITION >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/5c3c341e03211936/a3e0974ffc9f47aac3d6b838967d376c/34943) As the top candidate running, California voters have a right to know how my policies stack up against Gavin Newsom’s. Will he back the blue? Support tax cuts for California's taxpayers? How will he help the homeless population get off the streets? How is he planning to tackle the wildfire crisis? **Voters deserve answers. They deserve to see both of our plans, side-by-side. ** I want to give that to Californians. Gavin Newsom doesn’t. That says a LOT. Thanks for your help,
Kevin Faulconer _**P.S. Whether Newsom agrees to a debate or not, we still need your help to spread my message for a California Comeback across the state. Please[CHIP IN NOW](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/5c3c341e03211936/4dac418bf430b9e2c3d6b838967d376c/34943) to help get out the vote!**_ | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/5c3c341e03211936/f353709e80a6c903c3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/5c3c341e03211936/488914768f990e90c3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/5c3c341e03211936/71b2e2c051a56d6fc3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/5c3c341e03211936/34afce7fc281cbe6c3d6b838967d376c/34943)

body:
| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miR52QTPVchffOIVLtW8o7Xjsz7IMHdVPgtd8A5G7lObn_QSciOy3edr7npUtd46QeqsMYXxhnnYHA6UUBlqgC-q8ZyNlV5srdFx4iIkeb7qAs7ppettfYV0-6AVJ3UVjY18bWA5pr_oFguowePNOGqYmZemuoVkKX0NaNQ1g9Z41v6fJqkUje3mbHlUpfaHTmFd9mxfLm3_uCOrdDcoGWWAikBg7SV3Skyb_I2ljoxfmmADSZKq3o2ylLUO-K6r-Q2LX_wlzVg1SF9jk1Q-yq5XfRFlaLusdeywnZGZsX_nmfU4s4KeGpM_TWMpstB400/3dr/bbTxbEPASVaQ5uGNGSafbA/h0/H9xeBwrhLxNfUIWSxzOlj8nNYEueqHOG2PoOS9I6jfU)
Derek, I’m going to try and be as civil as I can about this.

Millionaire Republican J.D. Vance just launched his campaign for Senate. You know as well as I do -- a guy who calls affordable childcare “class war against normal people” doesn’t belong anywhere near the Senate.

We can’t let his announcement derail us from expanding our Democratic majority -- political experts say that Ohio’s open Senate seat is one of the most likely to flip.

[**Our Our grassroots team CAN win, but only with the resources to stay strong in what will be one of the most competitive and expensive races of 2022 -- can I count on you to be one of the 345 supporters we need to split a contribution between my campaign and Common Good of $25 or more by midnight tonight?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miR52QTPVchffOIVLtW8o7Xr4Vfsuomh7R5ZdHAHPCr8N5ZS2AvaD9YmgFAtznvAOoOK9VpbWhFeC31pkMgxnFlt00PYCI7XNaXhrx_GmVnSc09rn7Cz47shg-q5K6kfuuRFoomnxRsyLxaf6n4GhC2QQxNR_gLkbD51oVTP8Rt7PKehKtf2033YgK5d_rt1xPAFVx2aQFAOSu7aWJIOvSYjCFrkPvnmRUUXb_4G19EavNWs_6dv_p4KFrfwKjsVr8cvnJbxWoTLOcH1H0nzPqdAr13H8ZxsvpZK0md2fUIX_tDk2gQOR_NwhmRA2ieejYS8SqxlrKj0IoteWKIbKpzw/3dr/bbTxbEPASVaQ5uGNGSafbA/h1/6qygxYB4LNQ0FT2j7zs_0aI8ISB7r5JEjyIrc4_mf_0) | [**DONATE »**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miR52QTPVchffOIVLtW8o7Xjsz7IMHdVPgtd8A5G7lObnxpr5adE436h9gafLFBH44WXCbdnkWAFx44INkzzSIL1boL_ikFPb6MLTF8GEfkir3t1unfG2FqfFAmDB5I9fQ_mutuw1YY9F_cut-TYLBMH5D9vMwKyoJ0MVbEQ_v6NT7oFt5kub_Sj-ZFz_n9ymhrrR0u4mrgjs63qTVtZj4Nx6ft4ufxitv_cIeaJJ3NfLdFhPhhnGap43b6Y467xCy6_L9BGE2-Sw8ngu3rm25moc4SiMn0sRFQaZc0qi7ppulX634FDwoGpKUgjleO2I7/3dr/bbTxbEPASVaQ5uGNGSafbA/h2/wSkR_DnLacO-DMjAjXhNl8v06I_7qMGC6Fcu4bdCmCY)

Vance doesn’t have a clue about the needs of hardworking Americans, but what he DOES have is the full backing of Trump’s billionaire friends and a Republican Super PAC with over $10 million at its disposal.

I won’t let Vance shift the conversation away from everyday Ohioans and their needs. clean_body: Peter, ALERT: The future of our nation is at stake. We are ONE seat away from regaining control of the United States Senate. To make that happen, we cannot afford to lose Ohio. I am counting on you and your support to ensure that Ohio’s Senate seat stays red so we can put an end to the radical left’s socialist takeover and defend our America First agenda. Let’s be clear:** the fate of the United States Senate, and the fate of our nation, rest on whether or not I win this seat. We cannot let this opportunity go to waste, Peter. PITCH IN BEFORE IT’S TOO LATE: I am counting on your support now more than ever, so we can take back the Senate and hold Chuck Schumer and Joe Biden accountable for refusing to put the American people first. ** Thank you, Josh Mandel Paid for by Team Josh A joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Citizens for Josh Mandel, Inc., Justice Opportunity Strength Honor PAC, and Shelby County Republican Party Federal Account. name: Scott Fitzgerald
subject: Disorder at the Southern Border
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
body:
Fitzgerald sits down with Newsmax's "Wake Up America"
Fitzgerald sits down with Newsmax's "Wake Up America" Yesterday, I joined Newsmax's "Wake Up America" to talk about my recent trip to the border.**_It was a wake-up call that all of America needs to hear!_** [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cneul-ahkdjtlkr-r/) [STAND UP - Defend Our Border!](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cneul-ahkdjtlkr-y/) Last month, nearly 200,000 illegal immigrants crossed our border. That's 450% more than last year with Trump in charge, and it's the highest number in 21 years. They weren't coming alone - drug smugglers brought fentanyl, meth, all kinds of illegal drugs, and worse. [**And it's about to go through the roof.**](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cneul-ahkdjtlkr-j/)On Newsmax, I discussed how the Biden administration is scheduled to repeal a key measure - Title 42 - that would make it easier for illegal immigrants to cross, come to any community in America and STAY.The liberals are sending a clear message: **Please come, the welcome mat is there for you! ****We need to take back the majority before things get even worse. We need to seize back control in Congress, and seize back control over our border.**[**Will YOU step up IMMEDIATELY to help?**](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cneul-ahkdjtlkr-t/) [Seize Back The Majority - Take Back The Border!](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cneul-ahkdjtlkr-h/) Thanks,
Scott Fitzgerald [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cneul-ahkdjtlkr-k/) [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cneul-ahkdjtlkr-u/)[](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cneul-ahkdjtlkr-o/) | Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress

clean_body: Fitzgerald sits down with Newsmax's "Wake Up America" Fitzgerald sits down with Newsmax's "Wake Up America" Yesterday, I joined Newsmax's "Wake Up America" to talk about my recent trip to the border.It was a wake-up call that all of America needs to hear! Last month, nearly 200,000 illegal immigrants crossed our border. That's 450% more than last year with Trump in charge, and it's the highest number in 21 years. They weren't coming alone - drug smugglers brought fentanyl, meth, all kinds of illegal drugs, and worse. Newsmax, I discussed how the Biden administration is scheduled to repeal a key measure - Title 42 - that would make it easier for illegal immigrants to cross, come to any community in America and STAY.The liberals are sending a clear message: Please come, the welcome mat is there for you! We need to take back the majority before things get even worse. We need to seize back control in Congress, and seize back control over our border. Thanks, Scott Fitzgerald | Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress P.O. Box 5048, Elm Grove, WI 53122 |

name: Official AOC Shop

body:
Shop our new ‘Housing is a human right’ t-shirt and help build our movement to boldly reimagine our country’s housing system.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210720-2290-header&t=1&akid=2290%2E2526796%2EoM-6Gt)
It’s past time that we recognize once and for all that **housing is a human right** and invest our resources accordingly. Everyone deserves a home that is affordable, safe, accessible, and located near employment opportunities. Period.
[If you agree, you can make your stance heard loud and clear with our new ‘Housing is a Human Right’ t-shirt designed by artist Lo Harris.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/9247?t=2&akid=2290%2E2526796%2EoM-6Gt) As always, proceeds help fund our free tutoring program, food programs, and local organizing in our community.
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/9247?t=3&akid=2290%2E2526796%2EoM-6Gt)
**[Shop the new t-shirt →](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/9247?t=4&akid=2290%2E2526796%2EoM-6Gt)**
As part of our artist collaboration series, this shirt is designed by [**Lo Harris**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/9246?t=5&akid=2290%2E2526796%2EoM-6Gt), a Brooklyn-based illustrator and animator who champions vibrance, confidence, and joy. Through the use of bright colors and strong figures she creates celebratory work that promotes visions of a more just and kind world.
We need to deal with the deepening housing crisis in America because:
* More than 17 million households are spending more than half of their income on housing.
* There are currently no states in the country where a full-time worker earning the federal minimum wage can afford a modest two-bedroom apartment.1
* Residents of public housing routinely suffer worse health outcomes due to mold infestations, lead contamination, poor indoor air quality, and unsafe temperatures.

[**Shop our newest ‘Housing is a human right’ t-shirt and support our movement to boldly reimagine our country’s housing system and protect occupants, repair public housing, and build new affordable housing.**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/9247?t=6&akid=2290%2E2526796%2EoM-6Gt)
Pa’lante,
Team AOC
1 - [CNBC](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/9245?t=7&akid=2290%2E2526796%2EoM-6Gt)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ocasio-campaign?refcode=em20210720-2290-P&t=8&refcode2=2290_2526796_oM-6Gt&akid=2290%2E2526796%2EoM-6Gt)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=9&akid=2290%2E2526796%2EoM-6Gt) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=10&akid=2290%2E2526796%2EoM-6Gt) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=11&akid=2290%2E2526796%2EoM-6Gt)
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=12&akid=2290%2E2526796%2EoM-6Gt)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=13&akid=2290%2E2526796%2EoM-6Gt)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
